 76        { method: 'GET',    path: '/api/v1/dashboard/stats',  description: 'Dashboard-Statistiken' },
 77        { method: 'GET',    path: '/api/v1/suche',            description: 'Volltextsuche' },
 78        { method: 'GET',    path: '/api/v1/admin/feature-flags', description: 'Feature-Flags' },
 79      ],
 80    },
 81  });
 82});
 83
 84// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 85// Auth-Middleware — Alle nachfolgenden Routen erfordern Authentifizierung
 86// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 87// PLATZHALTER: Befüllt req.user; in Produktion JWT-Token validieren.
 88// Ausgenommen: /health und / (Übersicht) — werden vor requireAuth registriert.
 89router.use(requireAuth);
 90
 91// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 92// Feature-Module
 93// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 94
 95// Haupt-Ressourcen
 96router.use('/gutachten', gutachtenRouter);
 97router.use('/kunden', kundenRouter);
 98router.use('/gutachter', gutachterRouter);
 99router.use('/termine', termineRouter);
100router.use('/kalender', termineRouter);
101router.use('/dashboard', dashboardRouter);
102router.use('/suche', sucheRouter);
103router.use('/admin', requireAdmin, adminRouter);
104
105// Sub-Ressourcen für Gutachten
106router.use('/gutachten/:gutachtenId/unfall', unfallRouter);
107router.use('/gutachten/:gutachtenId/fahrzeuge', fahrzeugeRouter);
108router.use('/gutachten/:gutachtenId/personen', personenRouter);
109router.use('/gutachten/:gutachtenId/schaden', schadenRouter);
110router.use('/gutachten/:gutachtenId/notizen', notizenRouter);
111router.use('/gutachten/:gutachtenId/aufgaben', aufgabenRouter);
112router.use('/gutachten/:gutachtenId/dateien', dateienRouter);
113router.use('/gutachten/:gutachtenId/audit', auditRouter);
114
115export { router as v1Router };
116
page.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/admin/page.tsx 117 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
  1/**
  2 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/admin/page.tsx
  3 * @description Admin-Panel.
  4 */
  5
  6'use client';
  7
  8import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  9
 10import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
 11import Card from '@mui/material/Card';
 12import CardContent from '@mui/material/CardContent';
 13import CardHeader from '@mui/material/CardHeader';
 14import Chip from '@mui/material/Chip';
 15import CircularProgress from '@mui/material/CircularProgress';
 16import Switch from '@mui/material/Switch';
 17import Table from '@mui/material/Table';
 18import TableBody from '@mui/material/TableBody';
 19import TableCell from '@mui/material/TableCell';
 20import TableContainer from '@mui/material/TableContainer';
 21import TableHead from '@mui/material/TableHead';
 22import TableRow from '@mui/material/TableRow';
 23import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';
 24
 25import { adminApi, type FeatureFlag } from '@/lib/api/admin.api';
 26
 27export default function AdminPage(): React.JSX.Element {
 28  const [flags, setFlags] = useState<FeatureFlag[]>([]);
 29  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 30  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 31
 32  useEffect(() => {
 33    adminApi
 34      .listFlags()
 35      .then(setFlags)
 36      .catch((err: Error) => setError(err.message))
 37      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
 38  }, []);
 39
 40  const handleToggle = async (name: string, aktiv: boolean) => {
 41    try {
 42      const updated = await adminApi.toggleFlag(name, aktiv);
 43      setFlags((prev) => prev.map((f) => (f.name === name ? updated : f)));
 44    } catch (err: unknown) {
 45      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Fehler beim Aktualisieren.');
 46    }
 47  };
 48
 49  return (
 50    <Box>
 51      <Typography variant="h4" fontWeight={700} gutterBottom>
 52        Admin-Panel
 53      </Typography>
 54
 55      <Card>
 56        <CardHeader
 57          title="Feature-Flags"
 58          subheader="Funktionen aktivieren oder deaktivieren"
 59        />
 60        <CardContent sx={{ p: 0 }}>
 61          {loading ? (
 62            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', p: 4 }}>
 63              <CircularProgress />
 64            </Box>
 65          ) : error ? (
 66            <Box sx={{ p: 3 }}>
 67              <Typography color="error">{error}</Typography>
 68            </Box>
 69          ) : flags.length === 0 ? (
 70            <Box sx={{ p: 3 }}>
 71              <Typography color="text.secondary">Keine Feature-Flags konfiguriert.</Typography>
 72            </Box>
 73          ) : (
 74            <TableContainer>
 75              <Table>
 76                <TableHead>
 77                  <TableRow>
 78                    <TableCell>Name</TableCell>
 79                    <TableCell>Beschreibung</TableCell>
 80                    <TableCell>Status</TableCell>
 81                    <TableCell align="right">Aktiv</TableCell>
 82                  </TableRow>
 83                </TableHead>
 84                <TableBody>
 85                  {flags.map((flag) => (
 86                    <TableRow key={flag.id}>
 87                      <TableCell>
 88                        <Typography variant="body2" fontWeight={600} fontFamily="monospace">
 89                          {flag.name}
 90                        </Typography>
 91                      </TableCell>
 92                      <TableCell>{flag.beschreibung ?? '—'}</TableCell>
 93                      <TableCell>
 94                        <Chip
 95                          label={flag.aktiv ? 'Aktiv' : 'Inaktiv'}
 96                          color={flag.aktiv ? 'success' : 'default'}
 97                          size="small"
 98                        />
 99                      </TableCell>
100                      <TableCell align="right">
101                        <Switch
102                          checked={flag.aktiv}
103                          onChange={(e) => handleToggle(flag.name, e.target.checked)}
104                        />
105                      </TableCell>
106                    </TableRow>
107                  ))}
108                </TableBody>
109              </Table>
110            </TableContainer>
111          )}
112        </CardContent>
113      </Card>
114    </Box>
115  );
116}
117
page.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/berichte/page.tsx 284 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
  1/**
  2 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/berichte/page.tsx
  3 * @description Berichte und Statistiken.
  4 */
  5
  6'use client';
  7
  8import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  9
 10import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
 11import Card from '@mui/material/Card';
 12import CardContent from '@mui/material/CardContent';
 13import CardHeader from '@mui/material/CardHeader';
 14import Chip from '@mui/material/Chip';
 15import CircularProgress from '@mui/material/CircularProgress';
 16import Divider from '@mui/material/Divider';
 17import Grid from '@mui/material/Grid';
 18import Paper from '@mui/material/Paper';
 19import Table from '@mui/material/Table';
 20import TableBody from '@mui/material/TableBody';
 21import TableCell from '@mui/material/TableCell';
 22import TableContainer from '@mui/material/TableContainer';
 23import TableHead from '@mui/material/TableHead';
 24import TableRow from '@mui/material/TableRow';
 25import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';
 26import {
 27  Bar,
 28  BarChart,
 29  CartesianGrid,
 30  Cell,
 31  Legend,
 32  Pie,
 33  PieChart,
 34  ResponsiveContainer,
 35  Tooltip,
 36  XAxis,
 37  YAxis,
 38} from 'recharts';
 39
 40import { dashboardApi, type DashboardStats, type MonatsuebersichtItem } from '@/lib/api/dashboard.api';
 41import type { GutachtenListItem } from '@/lib/api/gutachten.api';
 42
 43const STATUS_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
 44  AUFGENOMMEN: 'Aufgenommen',
 45  BEAUFTRAGT: 'Beauftragt',
 46  BESICHTIGUNG: 'Besichtigung',
 47  ENTWURF: 'Entwurf',
 48  FREIGABE: 'Freigabe',
 49  FERTIG: 'Fertig',
 50  ARCHIV: 'Archiviert',
 51};
 52
 53const STATUS_COLORS_HEX: Record<string, string> = {
 54  AUFGENOMMEN: '#90caf9',
 55  BEAUFTRAGT: '#1976d2',
 56  BESICHTIGUNG: '#42a5f5',
 57  ENTWURF: '#ffa726',
 58  FREIGABE: '#ff7043',
 59  FERTIG: '#66bb6a',
 60  ARCHIV: '#bdbdbd',
 61};
 62
 63const STATUS_CHIP_COLORS: Record<string, 'default' | 'primary' | 'warning' | 'success' | 'error'> = {
 64  AUFGENOMMEN: 'default',
 65  BEAUFTRAGT: 'primary',
 66  BESICHTIGUNG: 'primary',
 67  ENTWURF: 'warning',
 68  FREIGABE: 'warning',
 69  FERTIG: 'success',
 70  ARCHIV: 'default',
 71};
 72
 73function StatCard({ label, value, color }: { label: string; value: number; color?: string }) {
 74  return (
 75    <Paper sx={{ p: 2.5, textAlign: 'center' }}>
 76      <Typography variant="h3" fontWeight={700} color={color ?? 'text.primary'}>
 77        {value}
 78      </Typography>
 79      <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary" sx={{ mt: 0.5 }}>
 80        {label}
 81      </Typography>
 82    </Paper>
 83  );
 84}
 85
 86export default function BerichtePage(): React.JSX.Element {
 87  const [stats, setStats] = useState<DashboardStats | null>(null);
 88  const [monats, setMonats] = useState<MonatsuebersichtItem[]>([]);
 89  const [fristen, setFristen] = useState<GutachtenListItem[]>([]);
 90  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 91  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 92
 93  useEffect(() => {
 94    Promise.all([
 95      dashboardApi.getStats(),
 96      dashboardApi.getMonatsuebersicht(),
 97      dashboardApi.getFristen(),
 98    ])
 99      .then(([s, m, f]) => {
100        setStats(s);
101        setMonats(m);
102        setFristen(f);
103      })
104      .catch((err: Error) => setError(err.message))
105      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
106  }, []);
107
108  if (loading) {
109    return (
110      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 8 }}>
111        <CircularProgress />
112      </Box>
113    );
114  }
115
116  if (error || !stats) {
117    return <Typography color="error">{error ?? 'Fehler beim Laden der Berichte.'}</Typography>;
118  }
119
120  const pieData = Object.entries(stats.statusVerteilung)
121    .filter(([, v]) => v > 0)
122    .map(([status, count]) => ({
123      name: STATUS_LABELS[status] ?? status,
124      value: count,
125      color: STATUS_COLORS_HEX[status] ?? '#9e9e9e',
126    }));
127
128  return (
129    <Box>
130      <Typography variant="h4" fontWeight={700} gutterBottom>
131        Berichte
132      </Typography>
133
134      {/* KPI-Karten */}
135      <Grid container spacing={2} sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
136        <Grid item xs={6} sm={4} md={2}>
137          <StatCard label="Gesamt" value={stats.gesamt} />
138        </Grid>
139        <Grid item xs={6} sm={4} md={2}>
140          <StatCard label="Aktiv" value={stats.aktiv} color="primary.main" />
141        </Grid>
142        <Grid item xs={6} sm={4} md={2}>
143          <StatCard label="Fertig" value={stats.fertig} color="success.main" />
144        </Grid>
145        <Grid item xs={6} sm={4} md={2}>
146          <StatCard label="Überfällig" value={stats.ueberfaellige} color={stats.ueberfaellige > 0 ? 'error.main' : undefined} />
147        </Grid>
148        <Grid item xs={6} sm={4} md={2}>
149          <StatCard label="Fällig in 30 Tagen" value={stats.faelligIn30Tagen} color={stats.faelligIn30Tagen > 0 ? 'warning.main' : undefined} />
150        </Grid>
151      </Grid>
152
153      <Grid container spacing={3} sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
154        {/* Statusverteilung Pie */}
155        <Grid item xs={12} md={5}>
156          <Card sx={{ height: '100%' }}>
157            <CardHeader title="Statusverteilung" />
158            <Divider />
159            <CardContent>
160              {pieData.length === 0 ? (
161                <Typography color="text.secondary" variant="body2">Keine Daten.</Typography>
162              ) : (
163                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={280}>
164                  <PieChart>
165                    <Pie
166                      data={pieData}
167                      cx="50%"
168                      cy="50%"
169                      outerRadius={100}
170                      dataKey="value"
171                      label={({ name, percent }) => `${name} ${(percent * 100).toFixed(0)}%`}
172                    >
173                      {pieData.map((entry, index) => (
174                        <Cell key={index} fill={entry.color} />
175                      ))}
176                    </Pie>
177                    <Tooltip formatter={(val) => [`${val} Gutachten`]} />
178                  </PieChart>
179                </ResponsiveContainer>
180              )}
181            </CardContent>
182          </Card>
183        </Grid>
184
185        {/* Monatsübersicht Bar */}
186        <Grid item xs={12} md={7}>
187          <Card sx={{ height: '100%' }}>
188            <CardHeader title="Monatsübersicht (letzte 12 Monate)" />
189            <Divider />
190            <CardContent>
191              {monats.length === 0 ? (
192                <Typography color="text.secondary" variant="body2">Keine Daten.</Typography>
193              ) : (
194                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={280}>
195                  <BarChart data={monats} margin={{ top: 5, right: 10, left: -10, bottom: 5 }}>
196                    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" />
197                    <XAxis dataKey="monat" tick={{ fontSize: 11 }} />
198                    <YAxis allowDecimals={false} tick={{ fontSize: 11 }} />
199                    <Tooltip />
200                    <Legend />
201                    <Bar dataKey="erstellt" name="Erstellt" fill="#1976d2" radius={[3, 3, 0, 0]} />
202                    <Bar dataKey="fertig" name="Fertig" fill="#66bb6a" radius={[3, 3, 0, 0]} />
203                  </BarChart>
204                </ResponsiveContainer>
205              )}
206            </CardContent>
207          </Card>
208        </Grid>
209      </Grid>
210
211      {/* Fristen-Tabelle */}
212      <Card>
213        <CardHeader
214          title="Anstehende Fristen"
215          subheader="Gutachten mit Fristen in den nächsten 30 Tagen oder bereits überfällig"
216        />
217        <Divider />
218        {fristen.length === 0 ? (
219          <CardContent>
220            <Typography color="text.secondary" variant="body2">
221              Keine ausstehenden Fristen.
222            </Typography>
223          </CardContent>
224        ) : (
225          <TableContainer>
226            <Table size="small">
227              <TableHead>
228                <TableRow>
229                  <TableCell>Aktenzeichen</TableCell>
230                  <TableCell>Titel</TableCell>
231                  <TableCell>Kunde</TableCell>
232                  <TableCell>Status</TableCell>
233                  <TableCell>Frist</TableCell>
234                </TableRow>
235              </TableHead>
236              <TableBody>
237                {fristen.map((g) => {
238                  const isOverdue = g.frist ? new Date(g.frist) < new Date() : false;
239                  return (
240                    <TableRow key={g.id} hover>
241                      <TableCell>
242                        <Typography variant="body2" fontWeight={600}>
243                          {g.aktenzeichen}
244                        </Typography>
245                      </TableCell>
246                      <TableCell>{g.titel}</TableCell>
247                      <TableCell>
248                        {g.kunde
249                          ? `${g.kunde.vorname ?? ''} ${g.kunde.nachname}`.trim()
250                          : '—'}
251                      </TableCell>
252                      <TableCell>
253                        <Chip
254                          label={STATUS_LABELS[g.status] ?? g.status}
255                          color={STATUS_CHIP_COLORS[g.status] ?? 'default'}
256                          size="small"
257                        />
258                      </TableCell>
259                      <TableCell>
260                        {g.frist ? (
261                          <Typography
262                            variant="body2"
263                            color={isOverdue ? 'error.main' : 'warning.main'}
264                            fontWeight={isOverdue ? 700 : 400}
265                          >
266                            {new Date(g.frist).toLocaleDateString('de-DE', {
267                              day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit', year: 'numeric',
268                            })}
269                            {isOverdue && ' (Überfällig)'}
270                          </Typography>
271                        ) : '—'}
272                      </TableCell>
273                    </TableRow>
274                  );
275                })}
276              </TableBody>
277            </Table>
278          </TableContainer>
279        )}
280      </Card>
281    </Box>
282  );
283}
284
page.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/page.tsx 289 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
  1/**
  2 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/page.tsx
  3 * @description Dashboard mit Statistiken und Übersichten.
  4 */
  5
  6'use client';
  7
  8import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  9
 10import AssignmentIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Assignment';
 11import CheckCircleIcon from '@mui/icons-material/CheckCircle';
 12import ErrorIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Error';
 13import HourglassIcon from '@mui/icons-material/HourglassEmpty';
 14import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
 15import Card from '@mui/material/Card';
 16import CardContent from '@mui/material/CardContent';
 17import CardHeader from '@mui/material/CardHeader';
 18import Chip from '@mui/material/Chip';
 19import CircularProgress from '@mui/material/CircularProgress';
 20import Grid from '@mui/material/Grid';
 21import List from '@mui/material/List';
 22import ListItem from '@mui/material/ListItem';
 23import ListItemText from '@mui/material/ListItemText';
 24import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';
 25import Link from 'next/link';
 26import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, Cell, PieChart, Pie, Legend } from 'recharts';
 27
 28import { dashboardApi, type DashboardStats, type MonatsuebersichtItem } from '@/lib/api/dashboard.api';
 29
 30interface StatCardProps {
 31  title: string;
 32  value: number;
 33  icon: React.ReactNode;
 34  color: string;
 35  subtitle?: string;
 36}
 37
 38function StatCard({ title, value, icon, color, subtitle }: StatCardProps): React.JSX.Element {
 39  return (
 40    <Card>
 41      <CardContent>
 42        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'space-between' }}>
 43          <Box>
 44            <Typography variant="h3" fontWeight={700} color={color}>
 45              {value}
 46            </Typography>
 47            <Typography variant="body1" fontWeight={600} gutterBottom>
 48              {title}
 49            </Typography>
 50            {subtitle && (
 51              <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">
 52                {subtitle}
 53              </Typography>
 54            )}
 55          </Box>
 56          <Box sx={{ color, opacity: 0.8, '& svg': { fontSize: 48 } }}>
 57            {icon}
 58          </Box>
 59        </Box>
 60      </CardContent>
 61    </Card>
 62  );
 63}
 64
 65const STATUS_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
 66  AUFGENOMMEN: 'Aufgenommen',
 67  BEAUFTRAGT: 'Beauftragt',
 68  BESICHTIGUNG: 'Besichtigung',
 69  ENTWURF: 'Entwurf',
 70  FREIGABE: 'Freigabe',
 71  FERTIG: 'Fertig',
 72  ARCHIV: 'Archiv',
 73};
 74
 75const STATUS_CHART_COLORS = ['#1565C0', '#1976d2', '#42a5f5', '#90caf9', '#FF6F00', '#4caf50', '#9e9e9e'];
 76
 77export default function DashboardPage(): React.JSX.Element {
 78  const [stats, setStats] = useState<DashboardStats | null>(null);
 79  const [monatsDaten, setMonatsDaten] = useState<MonatsuebersichtItem[]>([]);
 80  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 81  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 82
 83  useEffect(() => {
 84    Promise.all([
 85      dashboardApi.getStats(),
 86      dashboardApi.getMonatsuebersicht(),
 87    ])
 88      .then(([s, m]) => {
 89        setStats(s);
 90        setMonatsDaten(m);
 91      })
 92      .catch((err: Error) => setError(err.message))
 93      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
 94  }, []);
 95
 96  if (loading) {
 97    return (
 98      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 8 }}>
 99        <CircularProgress />
100      </Box>
101    );
102  }
103
104  if (error) {
105    return <Typography color="error">{error}</Typography>;
106  }
107
108  const statusChartData = stats
109    ? Object.entries(stats.statusVerteilung).map(([status, count]) => ({
110        name: STATUS_LABELS[status] ?? status,
111        value: count,
112      }))
113    : [];
114
115  const monatLabels = monatsDaten.map((m) => {
116    const [year, month] = m.monat.split('-');
117    return new Date(parseInt(year), parseInt(month) - 1).toLocaleDateString('de-DE', {
118      month: 'short',
119      year: '2-digit',
120    });
121  });
122
123  return (
124    <Box>
125      <Typography variant="h4" fontWeight={700} gutterBottom>
126        Dashboard
127      </Typography>
128
129      {/* KPI-Karten */}
130      <Grid container spacing={3} sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
131        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
132          <StatCard
133            title="Gesamt"
134            value={stats?.gesamt ?? 0}
135            icon={<AssignmentIcon />}
136            color="primary.main"
137          />
138        </Grid>
139        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
140          <StatCard
141            title="Aktiv"
142            value={stats?.aktiv ?? 0}
143            icon={<HourglassIcon />}
144            color="info.main"
145            subtitle="In Bearbeitung"
146          />
147        </Grid>
148        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
149          <StatCard
150            title="Fertig"
151            value={stats?.fertig ?? 0}
152            icon={<CheckCircleIcon />}
153            color="success.main"
154          />
155        </Grid>
156        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
157          <StatCard
158            title="Überfällig"
159            value={stats?.ueberfaellige ?? 0}
160            icon={<ErrorIcon />}
161            color="error.main"
162            subtitle="Frist überschritten"
163          />
164        </Grid>
165      </Grid>
166
167      <Grid container spacing={3}>
168        {/* Monats-Chart */}
169        <Grid item xs={12} md={8}>
170          <Card>
171            <CardHeader title="Monatliche Entwicklung" subheader="Letzte 12 Monate" />
172            <CardContent>
173              {monatsDaten.length > 0 ? (
174                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={280}>
175                  <BarChart data={monatsDaten.map((m, i) => ({ ...m, label: monatLabels[i] }))}>
176                    <XAxis dataKey="label" tick={{ fontSize: 12 }} />
177                    <YAxis tick={{ fontSize: 12 }} />
178                    <Tooltip
179                      formatter={(value: number, name: string) => [
180                        value,
181                        name === 'erstellt' ? 'Erstellt' : 'Fertig',
182                      ]}
183                    />
184                    <Legend formatter={(v) => v === 'erstellt' ? 'Erstellt' : 'Fertig'} />
185                    <Bar dataKey="erstellt" fill="#1565C0" name="erstellt" />
186                    <Bar dataKey="fertig" fill="#4caf50" name="fertig" />
187                  </BarChart>
188                </ResponsiveContainer>
189              ) : (
190                <Box sx={{ textAlign: 'center', py: 4 }}>
191                  <Typography color="text.secondary">Noch keine Daten vorhanden.</Typography>
192                </Box>
193              )}
194            </CardContent>
195          </Card>
196        </Grid>
197
198        {/* Status-Verteilung */}
199        <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
200          <Card>
201            <CardHeader title="Status-Verteilung" />
202            <CardContent>
203              {statusChartData.length > 0 ? (
204                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={280}>
205                  <PieChart>
206                    <Pie
207                      data={statusChartData}
208                      dataKey="value"
209                      nameKey="name"
210                      cx="50%"
211                      cy="45%"
212                      outerRadius={80}
213                      label={({ name, value }) => `${name}: ${value}`}
214                      labelLine={false}
215                    >
216                      {statusChartData.map((_, i) => (
217                        <Cell key={i} fill={STATUS_CHART_COLORS[i % STATUS_CHART_COLORS.length]} />
218                      ))}
219                    </Pie>
220                    <Tooltip />
221                  </PieChart>
222                </ResponsiveContainer>
223              ) : (
224                <Box sx={{ textAlign: 'center', py: 4 }}>
225                  <Typography color="text.secondary">Noch keine Daten vorhanden.</Typography>
226                </Box>
227              )}
228            </CardContent>
229          </Card>
230        </Grid>
231
232        {/* Aktuelle Gutachten */}
233        <Grid item xs={12}>
234          <Card>
235            <CardHeader
236              title="Zuletzt bearbeitet"
237              subheader="Letzte 10 aktive Gutachten"
238            />
239            <CardContent sx={{ p: 0 }}>
240              {stats?.aktuelleGutachten.length ? (
241                <List dense>
242                  {stats.aktuelleGutachten.map((g, idx) => (
243                    <ListItem
244                      key={g.id}
245                      component={Link}
246                      href={`/gutachten/${g.id}`}
247                      sx={{
248                        borderBottom: idx < (stats.aktuelleGutachten.length - 1) ? '1px solid' : 'none',
249                        borderColor: 'divider',
250                        '&:hover': { bgcolor: 'action.hover' },
251                      }}
252                    >
253                      <ListItemText
254                        primary={
255                          <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1 }}>
256                            <Typography variant="body2" fontWeight={600} color="primary">
257                              {g.aktenzeichen}
258                            </Typography>
259                            <Typography variant="body2">{g.titel}</Typography>
260                            <Chip label={STATUS_LABELS[g.status] ?? g.status} size="small" sx={{ ml: 'auto' }} />
261                          </Box>
262                        }
263                        secondary={
264                          <>
265                            {g.kunde && `${g.kunde.vorname ?? ''} ${g.kunde.nachname}`.trim()}
266                            {g.frist && (
267                              <span style={{ marginLeft: 8 }}>
268                                Frist: {new Date(g.frist).toLocaleDateString('de-DE')}
269                              </span>
270                            )}
271                          </>
272                        }
273                      />
274                    </ListItem>
275                  ))}
276                </List>
277              ) : (
278                <Box sx={{ p: 3, textAlign: 'center' }}>
279                  <Typography color="text.secondary">Noch keine Gutachten vorhanden.</Typography>
280                </Box>
281              )}
282            </CardContent>
283          </Card>
284        </Grid>
285      </Grid>
286    </Box>
287  );
288}
289
page.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/gutachten/[id]/edit/page.tsx 199 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
  1/**
  2 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/gutachten/[id]/edit/page.tsx
  3 * @description Gutachten bearbeiten.
  4 */
  5
  6'use client';
  7
  8import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  9
 10import ArrowBackIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ArrowBack';
 11import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
 12import Button from '@mui/material/Button';
 13import Card from '@mui/material/Card';
 14import CardContent from '@mui/material/CardContent';
 15import CardHeader from '@mui/material/CardHeader';
 16import CircularProgress from '@mui/material/CircularProgress';
 17import MenuItem from '@mui/material/MenuItem';
 18import TextField from '@mui/material/TextField';
 19import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';
 20import Link from 'next/link';
 21import { useParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
 22
 23import { gutachtenApi, type GutachtenStatus } from '@/lib/api/gutachten.api';
 24
 25const STATUS_OPTIONS: Array<{ value: GutachtenStatus; label: string }> = [
 26  { value: 'AUFGENOMMEN', label: 'Aufgenommen' },
 27  { value: 'BEAUFTRAGT', label: 'Beauftragt' },
 28  { value: 'BESICHTIGUNG', label: 'Besichtigung' },
 29  { value: 'ENTWURF', label: 'Entwurf' },
 30  { value: 'FREIGABE', label: 'Freigabe' },
 31  { value: 'FERTIG', label: 'Fertig' },
 32  { value: 'ARCHIV', label: 'Archiv' },
 33];
 34
 35export default function EditGutachtenPage(): React.JSX.Element {
 36  const params = useParams();
 37  const router = useRouter();
 38  const id = params.id as string;
 39
 40  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 41  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
 42  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 43  const [form, setForm] = useState({
 44    titel: '',
 45    aktenzeichen: '',
 46    status: 'AUFGENOMMEN' as GutachtenStatus,
 47    beschreibung: '',
 48    frist: '',
 49    auftragsdatum: '',
 50  });
 51
 52  useEffect(() => {
 53    gutachtenApi
 54      .findById(id)
 55      .then((g) => {
 56        setForm({
 57          titel: g.titel,
 58          aktenzeichen: g.aktenzeichen,
 59          status: g.status,
 60          beschreibung: g.beschreibung ?? '',
 61          frist: g.frist ? new Date(g.frist).toISOString().split('T')[0] : '',
 62          auftragsdatum: g.auftragsdatum
 63            ? new Date(g.auftragsdatum).toISOString().split('T')[0]
 64            : '',
 65        });
 66      })
 67      .catch((err: Error) => setError(err.message))
 68      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
 69  }, [id]);
 70
 71  const handleChange = (field: keyof typeof form) => (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
 72    setForm((prev) => ({ ...prev, [field]: e.target.value }));
 73  };
 74
 75  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
 76    e.preventDefault();
 77    setSaving(true);
 78    setError(null);
 79    try {
 80      await gutachtenApi.update(id, {
 81        titel: form.titel,
 82        aktenzeichen: form.aktenzeichen,
 83        status: form.status,
 84        beschreibung: form.beschreibung || undefined,
 85        frist: form.frist ? new Date(form.frist).toISOString() : null,
 86        auftragsdatum: form.auftragsdatum ? new Date(form.auftragsdatum).toISOString() : null,
 87      });
 88      router.push(`/gutachten/${id}`);
 89    } catch (err: unknown) {
 90      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Fehler beim Speichern.');
 91      setSaving(false);
 92    }
 93  };
 94
 95  if (loading) {
 96    return (
 97      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 8 }}>
 98        <CircularProgress />
 99      </Box>
100    );
101  }
102
103  return (
104    <Box>
105      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 2, mb: 3 }}>
106        <Button startIcon={<ArrowBackIcon />} component={Link} href={`/gutachten/${id}`} color="inherit">
107          Zurück
108        </Button>
109        <Typography variant="h4" fontWeight={700}>
110          Gutachten bearbeiten
111        </Typography>
112      </Box>
113
114      <Card sx={{ maxWidth: 800 }}>
115        <CardHeader title={form.aktenzeichen} />
116        <CardContent>
117          <Box component="form" onSubmit={handleSubmit} sx={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 2 }}>
118            {error && (
119              <Typography color="error" variant="body2">
120                {error}
121              </Typography>
122            )}
123
124            <TextField
125              label="Titel *"
126              value={form.titel}
127              onChange={handleChange('titel')}
128              required
129              fullWidth
130            />
131
132            <TextField
133              label="Aktenzeichen"
134              value={form.aktenzeichen}
135              onChange={handleChange('aktenzeichen')}
136              fullWidth
137            />
138
139            <TextField
140              label="Status"
141              value={form.status}
142              onChange={handleChange('status')}
143              select
144              fullWidth
145            >
146              {STATUS_OPTIONS.map((opt) => (
147                <MenuItem key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>
148                  {opt.label}
149                </MenuItem>
150              ))}
151            </TextField>
152
153            <TextField
154              label="Auftragsdatum"
155              type="date"
156              value={form.auftragsdatum}
157              onChange={handleChange('auftragsdatum')}
158              fullWidth
159              InputLabelProps={{ shrink: true }}
160            />
161
162            <TextField
163              label="Frist"
164              type="date"
165              value={form.frist}
166              onChange={handleChange('frist')}
167              fullWidth
168              InputLabelProps={{ shrink: true }}
169            />
170
171            <TextField
172              label="Beschreibung"
173              value={form.beschreibung}
174              onChange={handleChange('beschreibung')}
175              multiline
176              rows={4}
177              fullWidth
178            />
179
180            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: 2, justifyContent: 'flex-end', mt: 2 }}>
181              <Button variant="outlined" component={Link} href={`/gutachten/${id}`} disabled={saving}>
182                Abbrechen
183              </Button>
184              <Button
185                type="submit"
186                variant="contained"
187                disabled={saving}
188                startIcon={saving ? <CircularProgress size={16} /> : undefined}
189              >
190                Speichern
191              </Button>
192            </Box>
193          </Box>
194        </CardContent>
195      </Card>
196    </Box>
197  );
198}
199
page.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/gutachten/[id]/page.tsx 1047 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
   1/**
   2 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/gutachten/[id]/page.tsx
   3 * @description Gutachten-Detailansicht mit vollständigen Unterressourcen-Tabs.
   4 */
   5
   6'use client';
   7
   8import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react';
   9
  10import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
  11import ArrowBackIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ArrowBack';
  12import DownloadIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Download';
  13import AttachFileIcon from '@mui/icons-material/AttachFile';
  14import CheckBoxIcon from '@mui/icons-material/CheckBox';
  15import CheckBoxOutlineBlankIcon from '@mui/icons-material/CheckBoxOutlineBlank';
  16import DeleteIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Delete';
  17import DirectionsCarIcon from '@mui/icons-material/DirectionsCar';
  18import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
  19import HistoryIcon from '@mui/icons-material/History';
  20import NoteIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Note';
  21import PeopleIcon from '@mui/icons-material/People';
  22import TaskAltIcon from '@mui/icons-material/TaskAlt';
  23import WarningIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Warning';
  24import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
  25import Button from '@mui/material/Button';
  26import Card from '@mui/material/Card';
  27import CardContent from '@mui/material/CardContent';
  28import CardHeader from '@mui/material/CardHeader';
  29import Chip from '@mui/material/Chip';
  30import CircularProgress from '@mui/material/CircularProgress';
  31import Dialog from '@mui/material/Dialog';
  32import DialogActions from '@mui/material/DialogActions';
  33import DialogContent from '@mui/material/DialogContent';
  34import DialogTitle from '@mui/material/DialogTitle';
  35import Divider from '@mui/material/Divider';
  36import Grid from '@mui/material/Grid';
  37import IconButton from '@mui/material/IconButton';
  38import List from '@mui/material/List';
  39import ListItem from '@mui/material/ListItem';
  40import ListItemSecondaryAction from '@mui/material/ListItemSecondaryAction';
  41import ListItemText from '@mui/material/ListItemText';
  42import MenuItem from '@mui/material/MenuItem';
  43import Paper from '@mui/material/Paper';
  44import Select from '@mui/material/Select';
  45import Tab from '@mui/material/Tab';
  46import Table from '@mui/material/Table';
  47import TableBody from '@mui/material/TableBody';
  48import TableCell from '@mui/material/TableCell';
  49import TableHead from '@mui/material/TableHead';
  50import TableRow from '@mui/material/TableRow';
  51import Tabs from '@mui/material/Tabs';
  52import TextField from '@mui/material/TextField';
  53import Tooltip from '@mui/material/Tooltip';
  54import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';
  55import Link from 'next/link';
  56import { useParams } from 'next/navigation';
  57
  58import { gutachtenApi, type GutachtenDetail, type GutachtenStatus } from '@/lib/api/gutachten.api';
  59import {
  60  subresourcesApi,
  61  type Aufgabe,
  62  type CreateAufgabeInput,
  63  type CreateFahrzeugInput,
  64  type CreateNotizInput,
  65  type CreatePersonInput,
  66  type CreateSchadenspostenInput,
  67  type Datei,
  68  type Fahrzeug,
  69  type Notiz,
  70  type Person,
  71  type PersonTyp,
  72  type Schadensposten,
  73  type Unfalldaten,
  74  type AuditEintrag,
  75} from '@/lib/api/subresources.api';
  76
  77const STATUS_LABELS: Record<GutachtenStatus, string> = {
  78  AUFGENOMMEN: 'Aufgenommen',
  79  BEAUFTRAGT: 'Beauftragt',
  80  BESICHTIGUNG: 'Besichtigung',
  81  ENTWURF: 'Entwurf',
  82  FREIGABE: 'Freigabe',
  83  FERTIG: 'Fertig',
  84  ARCHIV: 'Archiv',
  85};
  86
  87const STATUS_COLORS: Record<
  88  GutachtenStatus,
  89  'default' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'error' | 'info' | 'success' | 'warning'
  90> = {
  91  AUFGENOMMEN: 'default',
  92  BEAUFTRAGT: 'info',
  93  BESICHTIGUNG: 'primary',
  94  ENTWURF: 'warning',
  95  FREIGABE: 'secondary',
  96  FERTIG: 'success',
  97  ARCHIV: 'default',
  98};
  99
 100const STATUS_UEBERGAENGE: Record<GutachtenStatus, GutachtenStatus[]> = {
 101  AUFGENOMMEN: ['BEAUFTRAGT'],
 102  BEAUFTRAGT: ['AUFGENOMMEN', 'BESICHTIGUNG'],
 103  BESICHTIGUNG: ['ENTWURF'],
 104  ENTWURF: ['BESICHTIGUNG', 'FREIGABE'],
 105  FREIGABE: ['ENTWURF', 'FERTIG'],
 106  FERTIG: ['ARCHIV'],
 107  ARCHIV: [],
 108};
 109
 110// PersonTyp-Enum gemäß Prisma-Schema (PersonTyp)
 111const PERSON_TYP_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
 112  FAHRER: 'Fahrer',
 113  BEIFAHRER: 'Beifahrer',
 114  FUSSGAENGER: 'Fußgänger',
 115  ZEUGE: 'Zeuge',
 116  VERLETZTE: 'Verletzte',
 117};
 118
 119// ─── Tab-Panel ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 120
 121interface TabPanelProps {
 122  children?: React.ReactNode;
 123  index: number;
 124  value: number;
 125}
 126
 127function TabPanel({ children, value, index }: TabPanelProps) {
 128  return (
 129    <Box role="tabpanel" hidden={value !== index} sx={{ pt: 3 }}>
 130      {value === index && children}
 131    </Box>
 132  );
 133}
 134
 135// ─── Fahrzeuge-Tab ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 136
 137function FahrzeugeTab({ gutachtenId }: { gutachtenId: string }) {
 138  const [items, setItems] = useState<Fahrzeug[]>([]);
 139  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 140  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
 141  const [form, setForm] = useState<CreateFahrzeugInput>({ kennzeichen: '', marke: '', modell: '' });
 142
 143  const load = useCallback(() => {
 144    subresourcesApi.fahrzeuge.list(gutachtenId).then(setItems).finally(() => setLoading(false));
 145  }, [gutachtenId]);
 146
 147  useEffect(() => { load(); }, [load]);
 148
 149  const handleSave = async () => {
 150    if (!form.kennzeichen || !form.marke || !form.modell) return;
 151    await subresourcesApi.fahrzeuge.create(gutachtenId, form);
 152    setOpen(false);
 153    setForm({ kennzeichen: '', marke: '', modell: '' });
 154    load();
 155  };
 156
 157  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
 158    await subresourcesApi.fahrzeuge.delete(gutachtenId, id);
 159    load();
 160  };
 161
 162  if (loading) return <CircularProgress size={24} />;
 163
 164  return (
 165    <>
 166      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'flex-end', mb: 2 }}>
 167        <Button startIcon={<AddIcon />} variant="contained" onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>
 168          Fahrzeug hinzufügen
 169        </Button>
 170      </Box>
 171
 172      {items.length === 0 ? (
 173        <Typography color="text.secondary">Noch keine Fahrzeuge erfasst.</Typography>
 174      ) : (
 175        <Table size="small">
 176          <TableHead>
 177            <TableRow>
 178              <TableCell>Kennzeichen</TableCell>
 179              <TableCell>Marke / Modell</TableCell>
 180              <TableCell>Baujahr</TableCell>
 181              <TableCell>Farbe</TableCell>
 182              <TableCell>FIN</TableCell>
 183              <TableCell />
 184            </TableRow>
 185          </TableHead>
 186          <TableBody>
 187            {items.map((f) => (
 188              <TableRow key={f.id}>
 189                <TableCell>{f.kennzeichen}</TableCell>
 190                <TableCell>{[f.marke, f.modell].filter(Boolean).join(' ') || '—'}</TableCell>
 191                <TableCell>{f.baujahr ?? '—'}</TableCell>
 192                <TableCell>{f.farbe ?? '—'}</TableCell>
 193                <TableCell>{f.fahrgestell ?? '—'}</TableCell>
 194                <TableCell>
 195                  <IconButton size="small" onClick={() => handleDelete(f.id)}>
 196                    <DeleteIcon fontSize="small" />
 197                  </IconButton>
 198                </TableCell>
 199              </TableRow>
 200            ))}
 201          </TableBody>
 202        </Table>
 203      )}
 204
 205      <Dialog open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} maxWidth="sm" fullWidth>
 206        <DialogTitle>Fahrzeug hinzufügen</DialogTitle>
 207        <DialogContent sx={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 2, pt: 2 }}>
 208          <TextField label="Kennzeichen" value={form.kennzeichen ?? ''} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, kennzeichen: e.target.value }))} />
 209          <TextField required label="Marke" value={form.marke} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, marke: e.target.value }))} />
 210          <TextField required label="Modell" value={form.modell} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, modell: e.target.value }))} />
 211          <TextField label="Baujahr" type="number" value={form.baujahr ?? ''} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, baujahr: Number(e.target.value) || undefined }))} />
 212          <TextField label="Farbe" value={form.farbe ?? ''} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, farbe: e.target.value }))} />
 213          <TextField label="FIN (Fahrgestellnummer)" value={form.fahrgestell ?? ''} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, fahrgestell: e.target.value }))} />
 214        </DialogContent>
 215        <DialogActions>
 216          <Button onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>Abbrechen</Button>
 217          <Button variant="contained" onClick={handleSave}>Speichern</Button>
 218        </DialogActions>
 219      </Dialog>
 220    </>
 221  );
 222}
 223
 224// ─── Personen-Tab ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 225
 226function PersonenTab({ gutachtenId }: { gutachtenId: string }) {
 227  const [items, setItems] = useState<Person[]>([]);
 228  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 229  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
 230  const [form, setForm] = useState<CreatePersonInput>({ typ: 'FAHRER', vorname: '', nachname: '' });
 231
 232  const load = useCallback(() => {
 233    subresourcesApi.personen.list(gutachtenId).then(setItems).finally(() => setLoading(false));
 234  }, [gutachtenId]);
 235
 236  useEffect(() => { load(); }, [load]);
 237
 238  const handleSave = async () => {
 239    if (!form.nachname) return;
 240    await subresourcesApi.personen.create(gutachtenId, form);
 241    setOpen(false);
 242    setForm({ typ: 'FAHRER', vorname: '', nachname: '' });
 243    load();
 244  };
 245
 246  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
 247    await subresourcesApi.personen.delete(gutachtenId, id);
 248    load();
 249  };
 250
 251  if (loading) return <CircularProgress size={24} />;
 252
 253  return (
 254    <>
 255      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'flex-end', mb: 2 }}>
 256        <Button startIcon={<AddIcon />} variant="contained" onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>
 257          Person hinzufügen
 258        </Button>
 259      </Box>
 260
 261      {items.length === 0 ? (
 262        <Typography color="text.secondary">Noch keine Personen erfasst.</Typography>
 263      ) : (
 264        <Table size="small">
 265          <TableHead>
 266            <TableRow>
 267              <TableCell>Typ</TableCell>
 268              <TableCell>Name</TableCell>
 269              <TableCell>Telefon</TableCell>
 270              <TableCell>E-Mail</TableCell>
 271              <TableCell />
 272            </TableRow>
 273          </TableHead>
 274          <TableBody>
 275            {items.map((p) => (
 276              <TableRow key={p.id}>
 277                <TableCell>
 278                  <Chip label={PERSON_TYP_LABELS[p.typ] ?? p.typ} size="small" />
 279                </TableCell>
 280                <TableCell>{[p.vorname, p.nachname].filter(Boolean).join(' ')}</TableCell>
 281                <TableCell>{p.telefon ?? '—'}</TableCell>
 282                <TableCell>{p.email ?? '—'}</TableCell>
 283                <TableCell>
 284                  <IconButton size="small" onClick={() => handleDelete(p.id)}>
 285                    <DeleteIcon fontSize="small" />
 286                  </IconButton>
 287                </TableCell>
 288              </TableRow>
 289            ))}
 290          </TableBody>
 291        </Table>
 292      )}
 293
 294      <Dialog open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} maxWidth="sm" fullWidth>
 295        <DialogTitle>Person hinzufügen</DialogTitle>
 296        <DialogContent sx={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 2, pt: 2 }}>
 297          <Select value={form.typ} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, typ: e.target.value as PersonTyp }))}>
 298            {Object.entries(PERSON_TYP_LABELS).map(([k, v]) => (
 299              <MenuItem key={k} value={k}>{v}</MenuItem>
 300            ))}
 301          </Select>
 302          <TextField label="Vorname" value={form.vorname ?? ''} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, vorname: e.target.value }))} />
 303          <TextField required label="Nachname" value={form.nachname} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, nachname: e.target.value }))} />
 304          <TextField label="Telefon" value={form.telefon ?? ''} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, telefon: e.target.value }))} />
 305          <TextField label="E-Mail" value={form.email ?? ''} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, email: e.target.value }))} />
 306          <TextField label="Adresse" value={form.adresse ?? ''} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, adresse: e.target.value }))} />
 307        </DialogContent>
 308        <DialogActions>
 309          <Button onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>Abbrechen</Button>
 310          <Button variant="contained" onClick={handleSave} disabled={!form.nachname}>Speichern</Button>
 311        </DialogActions>
 312      </Dialog>
 313    </>
 314  );
 315}
 316
 317// ─── Schaden-Tab ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 318
 319const SCHADENS_KATEGORIEN = [
 320  'Reparatur', 'Wertminderung', 'Nutzungsausfall', 'Gutachterkosten',
 321  'Mietwagenkosten', 'Abschleppkosten', 'Sonstiges',
 322];
 323
 324function SchadenTab({ gutachtenId }: { gutachtenId: string }) {
 325  const [posten, setPosten] = useState<Schadensposten[]>([]);
 326  const [gesamtEuro, setGesamtEuro] = useState(0);
 327  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 328  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
 329  // betragCents: Eingabe in Euro, intern in Cents umrechnen
 330  const [euroEingabe, setEuroEingabe] = useState('');
 331  const [form, setForm] = useState<Omit<CreateSchadenspostenInput, 'betragCents'>>({
 332    position: 1,
 333    bezeichnung: '',
 334    kategorie: 'Reparatur',
 335  });
 336
 337  const load = useCallback(() => {
 338    subresourcesApi.schaden.list(gutachtenId)
 339      .then((res) => {
 340        setPosten(res.posten);
 341        setGesamtEuro(res.summen.gesamtEuro); // korrekt: summen.gesamtEuro
 342      })
 343      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
 344  }, [gutachtenId]);
 345
 346  useEffect(() => { load(); }, [load]);
 347
 348  const handleSave = async () => {
 349    if (!form.bezeichnung || !euroEingabe) return;
 350    const betragCents = Math.round(parseFloat(euroEingabe.replace(',', '.')) * 100);
 351    if (isNaN(betragCents) || betragCents <= 0) return;
 352    await subresourcesApi.schaden.create(gutachtenId, { ...form, betragCents });
 353    setOpen(false);
 354    setForm({ position: posten.length + 2, bezeichnung: '', kategorie: 'Reparatur' });
 355    setEuroEingabe('');
 356    load();
 357  };
 358
 359  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
 360    await subresourcesApi.schaden.delete(gutachtenId, id);
 361    load();
 362  };
 363
 364  const fmt = (euro: number) => euro.toLocaleString('de-DE', { style: 'currency', currency: 'EUR' });
 365
 366  if (loading) return <CircularProgress size={24} />;
 367
 368  return (
 369    <>
 370      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', mb: 2 }}>
 371        <Typography variant="h6">Gesamtschaden: <strong>{fmt(gesamtEuro)}</strong></Typography>
 372        <Button startIcon={<AddIcon />} variant="contained" onClick={() => {
 373          setForm({ position: posten.length + 1, bezeichnung: '', kategorie: 'Reparatur' });
 374          setOpen(true);
 375        }}>
 376          Posten hinzufügen
 377        </Button>
 378      </Box>
 379
 380      {posten.length === 0 ? (
 381        <Typography color="text.secondary">Noch keine Schadensposten erfasst.</Typography>
 382      ) : (
 383        <Table size="small">
 384          <TableHead>
 385            <TableRow>
 386              <TableCell>#</TableCell>
 387              <TableCell>Bezeichnung</TableCell>
 388              <TableCell>Kategorie</TableCell>
 389              <TableCell align="right">Betrag</TableCell>
 390              <TableCell />
 391            </TableRow>
 392          </TableHead>
 393          <TableBody>
 394            {posten.map((sp) => (
 395              <TableRow key={sp.id}>
 396                <TableCell>{sp.position}</TableCell>
 397                <TableCell>{sp.bezeichnung}</TableCell>       {/* korrekt: bezeichnung */}
 398                <TableCell>{sp.kategorie}</TableCell>        {/* korrekt: kategorie */}
 399                <TableCell align="right">{fmt(sp.betragCents / 100)}</TableCell>  {/* Cents → Euro */}
 400                <TableCell>
 401                  <IconButton size="small" onClick={() => handleDelete(sp.id)}>
 402                    <DeleteIcon fontSize="small" />
 403                  </IconButton>
 404                </TableCell>
 405              </TableRow>
 406            ))}
 407            <TableRow>
 408              <TableCell colSpan={3} align="right"><strong>Gesamt</strong></TableCell>
 409              <TableCell align="right"><strong>{fmt(gesamtEuro)}</strong></TableCell>
 410              <TableCell />
 411            </TableRow>
 412          </TableBody>
 413        </Table>
 414      )}
 415
 416      <Dialog open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} maxWidth="sm" fullWidth>
 417        <DialogTitle>Schadensposten hinzufügen</DialogTitle>
 418        <DialogContent sx={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 2, pt: 2 }}>
 419          <TextField required label="Bezeichnung" value={form.bezeichnung}
 420            onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, bezeichnung: e.target.value }))} />
 421          <Select value={form.kategorie}
 422            onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, kategorie: e.target.value }))}>
 423            {SCHADENS_KATEGORIEN.map((k) => <MenuItem key={k} value={k}>{k}</MenuItem>)}
 424          </Select>
 425          <TextField required label="Betrag (€)" value={euroEingabe} placeholder="z.B. 1500.00"
 426            onChange={(e) => setEuroEingabe(e.target.value)} />
 427          <TextField label="Position" type="number" value={form.position}
 428            onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, position: Number(e.target.value) }))} />
 429        </DialogContent>
 430        <DialogActions>
 431          <Button onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>Abbrechen</Button>
 432          <Button variant="contained" onClick={handleSave}
 433            disabled={!form.bezeichnung || !euroEingabe}>Speichern</Button>
 434        </DialogActions>
 435      </Dialog>
 436    </>
 437  );
 438}
 439
 440// ─── Notizen-Tab ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 441
 442function NotizenTab({ gutachtenId }: { gutachtenId: string }) {
 443  const [items, setItems] = useState<Notiz[]>([]);
 444  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 445  const [inhalt, setInhalt] = useState('');
 446  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
 447
 448  const load = useCallback(() => {
 449    subresourcesApi.notizen.list(gutachtenId).then(setItems).finally(() => setLoading(false));
 450  }, [gutachtenId]);
 451
 452  useEffect(() => { load(); }, [load]);
 453
 454  const handleSave = async () => {
 455    if (!inhalt.trim()) return;
 456    setSaving(true);
 457    await subresourcesApi.notizen.create(gutachtenId, { inhalt });
 458    setInhalt('');
 459    setSaving(false);
 460    load();
 461  };
 462
 463  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
 464    await subresourcesApi.notizen.delete(gutachtenId, id);
 465    load();
 466  };
 467
 468  if (loading) return <CircularProgress size={24} />;
 469
 470  return (
 471    <>
 472      <Box sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
 473        <TextField
 474          fullWidth
 475          multiline
 476          rows={3}
 477          label="Neue Notiz"
 478          value={inhalt}
 479          onChange={(e) => setInhalt(e.target.value)}
 480          placeholder="Notiz eingeben..."
 481        />
 482        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'flex-end', mt: 1 }}>
 483          <Button variant="contained" onClick={handleSave} disabled={saving || !inhalt.trim()}>
 484            Notiz speichern
 485          </Button>
 486        </Box>
 487      </Box>
 488
 489      {items.length === 0 ? (
 490        <Typography color="text.secondary">Noch keine Notizen vorhanden.</Typography>
 491      ) : (
 492        <List disablePadding>
 493          {items.map((n, i) => (
 494            <React.Fragment key={n.id}>
 495              {i > 0 && <Divider />}
 496              <ListItem alignItems="flex-start" sx={{ px: 0 }}>
 497                <ListItemText
 498                  primary={<Typography sx={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }}>{n.inhalt}</Typography>}
 499                  secondary={`${n.autor ?? 'System'} · ${new Date(n.createdAt).toLocaleString('de-DE')}`}
 500                />
 501                <ListItemSecondaryAction>
 502                  <IconButton edge="end" size="small" onClick={() => handleDelete(n.id)}>
 503                    <DeleteIcon fontSize="small" />
 504                  </IconButton>
 505                </ListItemSecondaryAction>
 506              </ListItem>
 507            </React.Fragment>
 508          ))}
 509        </List>
 510      )}
 511    </>
 512  );
 513}
 514
 515// ─── Aufgaben-Tab ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 516
 517function AufgabenTab({ gutachtenId }: { gutachtenId: string }) {
 518  const [items, setItems] = useState<Aufgabe[]>([]);
 519  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 520  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
 521  const [form, setForm] = useState<CreateAufgabeInput>({ titel: '' });
 522
 523  const load = useCallback(() => {
 524    subresourcesApi.aufgaben.list(gutachtenId).then(setItems).finally(() => setLoading(false));
 525  }, [gutachtenId]);
 526
 527  useEffect(() => { load(); }, [load]);
 528
 529  const handleToggle = async (id: string, erledigt: boolean) => {
 530    await subresourcesApi.aufgaben.toggleErledigt(gutachtenId, id, !erledigt);
 531    load();
 532  };
 533
 534  const handleSave = async () => {
 535    if (!form.titel) return;
 536    await subresourcesApi.aufgaben.create(gutachtenId, form);
 537    setOpen(false);
 538    setForm({ titel: '' });
 539    load();
 540  };
 541
 542  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
 543    await subresourcesApi.aufgaben.delete(gutachtenId, id);
 544    load();
 545  };
 546
 547  const offen = items.filter((a) => !a.erledigt).length;
 548
 549  if (loading) return <CircularProgress size={24} />;
 550
 551  return (
 552    <>
 553      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', mb: 2 }}>
 554        <Typography color="text.secondary">{offen} offene Aufgabe{offen !== 1 ? 'n' : ''}</Typography>
 555        <Button startIcon={<AddIcon />} variant="contained" onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>
 556          Aufgabe hinzufügen
 557        </Button>
 558      </Box>
 559
 560      {items.length === 0 ? (
 561        <Typography color="text.secondary">Noch keine Aufgaben vorhanden.</Typography>
 562      ) : (
 563        <List disablePadding>
 564          {items.map((a, i) => (
 565            <React.Fragment key={a.id}>
 566              {i > 0 && <Divider />}
 567              <ListItem sx={{ px: 0 }}>
 568                <IconButton size="small" onClick={() => handleToggle(a.id, a.erledigt)} sx={{ mr: 1 }}>
 569                  {a.erledigt ? <CheckBoxIcon color="success" /> : <CheckBoxOutlineBlankIcon />}
 570                </IconButton>
 571                <ListItemText
 572                  primary={
 573                    <Typography sx={{ textDecoration: a.erledigt ? 'line-through' : 'none', color: a.erledigt ? 'text.secondary' : 'text.primary' }}>
 574                      {a.titel}
 575                    </Typography>
 576                  }
 577                  secondary={[
 578                    a.zugewiesen && `Zugewiesen: ${a.zugewiesen}`,
 579                    a.faelligAm && `Fällig: ${new Date(a.faelligAm).toLocaleDateString('de-DE')}`,
 580                  ].filter(Boolean).join(' · ')}
 581                />
 582                <ListItemSecondaryAction>
 583                  <IconButton edge="end" size="small" onClick={() => handleDelete(a.id)}>
 584                    <DeleteIcon fontSize="small" />
 585                  </IconButton>
 586                </ListItemSecondaryAction>
 587              </ListItem>
 588            </React.Fragment>
 589          ))}
 590        </List>
 591      )}
 592
 593      <Dialog open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} maxWidth="sm" fullWidth>
 594        <DialogTitle>Aufgabe hinzufügen</DialogTitle>
 595        <DialogContent sx={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 2, pt: 2 }}>
 596          <TextField required label="Titel" value={form.titel} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, titel: e.target.value }))} />
 597          <TextField label="Beschreibung" multiline rows={2} value={form.beschreibung ?? ''} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, beschreibung: e.target.value }))} />
 598          <TextField label="Zugewiesen an" value={form.zugewiesen ?? ''} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, zugewiesen: e.target.value }))} />
 599          <TextField label="Fällig am" type="date" InputLabelProps={{ shrink: true }} value={form.faelligAm ?? ''} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, faelligAm: e.target.value }))} />
 600        </DialogContent>
 601        <DialogActions>
 602          <Button onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>Abbrechen</Button>
 603          <Button variant="contained" onClick={handleSave} disabled={!form.titel}>Speichern</Button>
 604        </DialogActions>
 605      </Dialog>
 606    </>
 607  );
 608}
 609
 610// ─── Dateien-Tab ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 611
 612function DateienTab({ gutachtenId }: { gutachtenId: string }) {
 613  const [items, setItems] = useState<Datei[]>([]);
 614  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 615  const [uploading, setUploading] = useState(false);
 616
 617  const load = useCallback(() => {
 618    subresourcesApi.dateien.list(gutachtenId).then(setItems).finally(() => setLoading(false));
 619  }, [gutachtenId]);
 620
 621  useEffect(() => { load(); }, [load]);
 622
 623  const handleUpload = async (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
 624    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
 625    if (!file) return;
 626    setUploading(true);
 627    const fd = new FormData();
 628    fd.append('datei', file);
 629    await subresourcesApi.dateien.upload(gutachtenId, fd);
 630    setUploading(false);
 631    load();
 632    e.target.value = '';
 633  };
 634
 635  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
 636    await subresourcesApi.dateien.delete(gutachtenId, id);
 637    load();
 638  };
 639
 640  const formatSize = (bytes: number) => {
 641    if (bytes < 1024) return `${bytes} B`;
 642    if (bytes < 1024 * 1024) return `${(bytes / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB`;
 643    return `${(bytes / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1)} MB`;
 644  };
 645
 646  if (loading) return <CircularProgress size={24} />;
 647
 648  return (
 649    <>
 650      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'flex-end', mb: 2 }}>
 651        <Button component="label" startIcon={<AttachFileIcon />} variant="contained" disabled={uploading}>
 652          {uploading ? 'Wird hochgeladen...' : 'Datei hochladen'}
 653          <input type="file" hidden onChange={handleUpload} />
 654        </Button>
 655      </Box>
 656
 657      {items.length === 0 ? (
 658        <Typography color="text.secondary">Noch keine Dateien hochgeladen.</Typography>
 659      ) : (
 660        <Table size="small">
 661          <TableHead>
 662            <TableRow>
 663              <TableCell>Dateiname</TableCell>
 664              <TableCell>Typ</TableCell>
 665              <TableCell>Größe</TableCell>
 666              <TableCell>Hochgeladen</TableCell>
 667              <TableCell />
 668            </TableRow>
 669          </TableHead>
 670          <TableBody>
 671            {items.map((d) => (
 672              <TableRow key={d.id}>
 673                <TableCell>
 674                  <a
 675                    href={subresourcesApi.dateien.downloadUrl(gutachtenId, d.id)}
 676                    target="_blank"
 677                    rel="noopener noreferrer"
 678                  >
 679                    {d.originalname}
 680                  </a>
 681                </TableCell>
 682                <TableCell>{d.mimetype}</TableCell>
 683                <TableCell>{formatSize(d.groesse)}</TableCell>
 684                <TableCell>{new Date(d.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('de-DE')}</TableCell>
 685                <TableCell>
 686                  <IconButton size="small" onClick={() => handleDelete(d.id)}>
 687                    <DeleteIcon fontSize="small" />
 688                  </IconButton>
 689                </TableCell>
 690              </TableRow>
 691            ))}
 692          </TableBody>
 693        </Table>
 694      )}
 695    </>
 696  );
 697}
 698
 699// ─── Unfalldaten-Tab ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 700
 701function UnfalldatenTab({ gutachtenId }: { gutachtenId: string }) {
 702  const [data, setData] = useState<Unfalldaten | null>(null);
 703  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 704  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
 705  const [form, setForm] = useState({
 706    strasse: '',
 707    plz: '',
 708    stadt: '',
 709    unfallZeit: '',
 710    unfallHergang: '',
 711    strassenzustand: '',     // korrekt: strassenzustand (nicht strassenverhaeltnisse)
 712    wetterlage: '',          // korrekt: wetterlage (nicht witterung)
 713    lichtverhaeltnis: '',    // korrekt: lichtverhaeltnis (nicht lichtverhaeltnisse)
 714    polizeiAktenzeichen: '',
 715  });
 716
 717  useEffect(() => {
 718    subresourcesApi.unfall.get(gutachtenId)
 719      .then((res) => {
 720        if (res) {
 721          setData(res);
 722          setForm({
 723            strasse: res.strasse ?? '',
 724            plz: res.plz ?? '',
 725            stadt: res.stadt ?? '',
 726            unfallZeit: res.unfallZeit ? res.unfallZeit.substring(0, 16) : '',
 727            unfallHergang: res.unfallHergang ?? '',
 728            strassenzustand: res.strassenzustand ?? '',
 729            wetterlage: res.wetterlage ?? '',
 730            lichtverhaeltnis: res.lichtverhaeltnis ?? '',
 731            polizeiAktenzeichen: res.polizeiAktenzeichen ?? '',
 732          });
 733        }
 734      })
 735      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
 736  }, [gutachtenId]);
 737
 738  const handleSave = async () => {
 739    setSaving(true);
 740    const res = await subresourcesApi.unfall.upsert(gutachtenId, {
 741      strasse: form.strasse || undefined,
 742      plz: form.plz || undefined,
 743      stadt: form.stadt || undefined,
 744      unfallZeit: form.unfallZeit ? new Date(form.unfallZeit).toISOString() : undefined,
 745      unfallHergang: form.unfallHergang || undefined,
 746      strassenzustand: form.strassenzustand || undefined,
 747      wetterlage: form.wetterlage || undefined,
 748      lichtverhaeltnis: form.lichtverhaeltnis || undefined,
 749      polizeiAktenzeichen: form.polizeiAktenzeichen || undefined,
 750    });
 751    setData(res);
 752    setSaving(false);
 753  };
 754
 755  if (loading) return <CircularProgress size={24} />;
 756
 757  return (
 758    <Grid container spacing={2}>
 759      <Grid item xs={12} md={6}>
 760        <TextField fullWidth label="Straße" value={form.strasse} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, strasse: e.target.value }))} />
 761      </Grid>
 762      <Grid item xs={12} md={2}>
 763        <TextField fullWidth label="PLZ" value={form.plz} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, plz: e.target.value }))} />
 764      </Grid>
 765      <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
 766        <TextField fullWidth label="Stadt" value={form.stadt} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, stadt: e.target.value }))} />
 767      </Grid>
 768      <Grid item xs={12} md={6}>
 769        <TextField fullWidth label="Unfallzeit" type="datetime-local" InputLabelProps={{ shrink: true }} value={form.unfallZeit} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, unfallZeit: e.target.value }))} />
 770      </Grid>
 771      <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
 772        <TextField fullWidth label="Straßenzustand" value={form.strassenzustand} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, strassenzustand: e.target.value }))} placeholder="TROCKEN, NASS, VEREIST…" />
 773      </Grid>
 774      <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
 775        <TextField fullWidth label="Wetterlage" value={form.wetterlage} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, wetterlage: e.target.value }))} placeholder="KLAR, REGEN, SCHNEE…" />
 776      </Grid>
 777      <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
 778        <TextField fullWidth label="Lichtverhältnis" value={form.lichtverhaeltnis} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, lichtverhaeltnis: e.target.value }))} placeholder="z.B. Tag, Nacht, Dämmerung" />
 779      </Grid>
 780      <Grid item xs={12} md={6}>
 781        <TextField fullWidth label="Polizei-Aktenzeichen" value={form.polizeiAktenzeichen} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, polizeiAktenzeichen: e.target.value }))} />
 782      </Grid>
 783      <Grid item xs={12}>
 784        <TextField fullWidth multiline rows={4} label="Unfallhergang" value={form.unfallHergang} onChange={(e) => setForm((p) => ({ ...p, unfallHergang: e.target.value }))} />
 785      </Grid>
 786      <Grid item xs={12}>
 787        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'flex-end' }}>
 788          <Button variant="contained" onClick={handleSave} disabled={saving}>
 789            {saving ? 'Wird gespeichert...' : 'Unfalldaten speichern'}
 790          </Button>
 791        </Box>
 792      </Grid>
 793    </Grid>
 794  );
 795}
 796
 797// ─── Audit-Tab ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 798
 799function AuditTab({ gutachtenId }: { gutachtenId: string }) {
 800  const [items, setItems] = useState<AuditEintrag[]>([]);
 801  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 802
 803  useEffect(() => {
 804    subresourcesApi.audit.list(gutachtenId).then(setItems).finally(() => setLoading(false));
 805  }, [gutachtenId]);
 806
 807  if (loading) return <CircularProgress size={24} />;
 808
 809  return items.length === 0 ? (
 810    <Typography color="text.secondary">Keine Audit-Einträge vorhanden.</Typography>
 811  ) : (
 812    <List disablePadding>
 813      {items.map((e, i) => (
 814        <React.Fragment key={e.id}>
 815          {i > 0 && <Divider />}
 816          <ListItem sx={{ px: 0 }}>
 817            <ListItemText
 818              primary={e.aktion}
 819              secondary={[
 820                e.autor && `von ${e.autor}`,
 821                new Date(e.createdAt).toLocaleString('de-DE'),
 822              ].filter(Boolean).join(' · ')}
 823            />
 824            {e.details && (
 825              <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary" sx={{ maxWidth: 400, ml: 2 }}>
 826                {e.details}
 827              </Typography>
 828            )}
 829          </ListItem>
 830        </React.Fragment>
 831      ))}
 832    </List>
 833  );
 834}
 835
 836// ─── Hauptseite ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 837
 838export default function GutachtenDetailPage(): React.JSX.Element {
 839  const params = useParams();
 840  const id = params.id as string;
 841
 842  const [gutachten, setGutachten] = useState<GutachtenDetail | null>(null);
 843  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 844  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 845  const [statusChanging, setStatusChanging] = useState(false);
 846  const [tab, setTab] = useState(0);
 847
 848  useEffect(() => {
 849    gutachtenApi
 850      .findById(id)
 851      .then(setGutachten)
 852      .catch((err: Error) => setError(err.message))
 853      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
 854  }, [id]);
 855
 856  const handleStatusChange = async (newStatus: GutachtenStatus) => {
 857    if (!gutachten) return;
 858    setStatusChanging(true);
 859    try {
 860      const updated = await gutachtenApi.updateStatus(id, newStatus);
 861      setGutachten((prev) => prev ? { ...prev, status: updated.status } : null);
 862    } catch (err: unknown) {
 863      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Status konnte nicht geändert werden.');
 864    } finally {
 865      setStatusChanging(false);
 866    }
 867  };
 868
 869  if (loading) {
 870    return (
 871      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 8 }}>
 872        <CircularProgress />
 873      </Box>
 874    );
 875  }
 876
 877  if (error || !gutachten) {
 878    return (
 879      <Box sx={{ mt: 4 }}>
 880        <Typography color="error">{error ?? 'Gutachten nicht gefunden.'}</Typography>
 881        <Button component={Link} href="/gutachten" startIcon={<ArrowBackIcon />} sx={{ mt: 2 }}>
 882          Zurück zur Liste
 883        </Button>
 884      </Box>
 885    );
 886  }
 887
 888  const erlaubteStatus = STATUS_UEBERGAENGE[gutachten.status];
 889
 890  return (
 891    <Box>
 892      {/* Header */}
 893      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'flex-start', mb: 3 }}>
 894        <Box>
 895          <Button startIcon={<ArrowBackIcon />} component={Link} href="/gutachten" color="inherit" sx={{ mb: 1 }}>
 896            Alle Gutachten
 897          </Button>
 898          <Typography variant="h4" fontWeight={700}>{gutachten.aktenzeichen}</Typography>
 899          <Typography variant="h6" color="text.secondary">{gutachten.titel}</Typography>
 900        </Box>
 901        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: 2, alignItems: 'center' }}>
 902          <Chip label={STATUS_LABELS[gutachten.status]} color={STATUS_COLORS[gutachten.status]} />
 903          <Button
 904            variant="outlined"
 905            startIcon={<DownloadIcon />}
 906            component="a"
 907            href={`${process.env['NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL'] ?? 'http://localhost:4000/api/v1'}/gutachten/${id}/pdf`}
 908            target="_blank"
 909            rel="noopener noreferrer"
 910          >
 911            PDF
 912          </Button>
 913          <Button variant="outlined" startIcon={<EditIcon />} component={Link} href={`/gutachten/${id}/edit`}>
 914            Bearbeiten
 915          </Button>
 916        </Box>
 917      </Box>
 918
 919      {/* Stammdaten + Workflow */}
 920      <Grid container spacing={3} sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
 921        <Grid item xs={12} md={8}>
 922          <Card>
 923            <CardHeader title="Stammdaten" />
 924            <CardContent>
 925              <Grid container spacing={2}>
 926                <Grid item xs={6}>
 927                  <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">Aktenzeichen</Typography>
 928                  <Typography variant="body1" fontWeight={600}>{gutachten.aktenzeichen}</Typography>
 929                </Grid>
 930                <Grid item xs={6}>
 931                  <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">Status</Typography>
 932                  <Typography variant="body1">{STATUS_LABELS[gutachten.status]}</Typography>
 933                </Grid>
 934                <Grid item xs={6}>
 935                  <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">Auftraggeber</Typography>
 936                  <Typography variant="body1">
 937                    {gutachten.kunde
 938                      ? `${gutachten.kunde.vorname ?? ''} ${gutachten.kunde.nachname}`.trim()
 939                      : '—'}
 940                  </Typography>
 941                </Grid>
 942                <Grid item xs={6}>
 943                  <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">Gutachter</Typography>
 944                  <Typography variant="body1">
 945                    {gutachten.gutachter
 946                      ? `${gutachten.gutachter.vorname} ${gutachten.gutachter.nachname}`
 947                      : '—'}
 948                  </Typography>
 949                </Grid>
 950                <Grid item xs={6}>
 951                  <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">Auftragsdatum</Typography>
 952                  <Typography variant="body1">
 953                    {gutachten.auftragsdatum ? new Date(gutachten.auftragsdatum).toLocaleDateString('de-DE') : '—'}
 954                  </Typography>
 955                </Grid>
 956                <Grid item xs={6}>
 957                  <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">Frist</Typography>
 958                  <Typography
 959                    variant="body1"
 960                    color={gutachten.frist && new Date(gutachten.frist) < new Date() ? 'error' : 'text.primary'}
 961                  >
 962                    {gutachten.frist ? new Date(gutachten.frist).toLocaleDateString('de-DE') : '—'}
 963                  </Typography>
 964                </Grid>
 965                {gutachten.beschreibung && (
 966                  <Grid item xs={12}>
 967                    <Divider sx={{ my: 1 }} />
 968                    <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">Beschreibung</Typography>
 969                    <Typography variant="body1" sx={{ mt: 0.5, whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }}>
 970                      {gutachten.beschreibung}
 971                    </Typography>
 972                  </Grid>
 973                )}
 974              </Grid>
 975            </CardContent>
 976          </Card>
 977        </Grid>
 978
 979        <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
 980          <Card>
 981            <CardHeader title="Workflow" />
 982            <CardContent>
 983              <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary" gutterBottom>Aktueller Status:</Typography>
 984              <Chip label={STATUS_LABELS[gutachten.status]} color={STATUS_COLORS[gutachten.status]} sx={{ mb: 2 }} />
 985              {erlaubteStatus.length > 0 && (
 986                <>
 987                  <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary" gutterBottom>Status ändern zu:</Typography>
 988                  <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 1 }}>
 989                    {erlaubteStatus.map((status) => (
 990                      <Button key={status} variant="outlined" size="small" disabled={statusChanging} onClick={() => handleStatusChange(status)}>
 991                        {STATUS_LABELS[status]}
 992                      </Button>
 993                    ))}
 994                  </Box>
 995                </>
 996              )}
 997              <Divider sx={{ my: 2 }} />
 998              <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary">
 999                Erstellt: {new Date(gutachten.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('de-DE')}
1000              </Typography>
1001              <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary">
1002                Geändert: {new Date(gutachten.updatedAt).toLocaleDateString('de-DE')}
1003              </Typography>
1004            </CardContent>
1005          </Card>
1006
1007          <Paper sx={{ p: 2, mt: 2 }}>
1008            <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary">
1009              Offene Aufgaben: {gutachten._count.aufgaben}
1010            </Typography>
1011            <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary">
1012              Dateien: {gutachten._count.dateien}
1013            </Typography>
1014          </Paper>
1015        </Grid>
1016      </Grid>
1017
1018      {/* Unterressourcen-Tabs */}
1019      <Card>
1020        <Box sx={{ borderBottom: 1, borderColor: 'divider' }}>
1021          <Tabs value={tab} onChange={(_, v) => setTab(v)} variant="scrollable" scrollButtons="auto">
1022            <Tab icon={<WarningIcon />} iconPosition="start" label="Unfalldaten" />
1023            <Tab icon={<DirectionsCarIcon />} iconPosition="start" label="Fahrzeuge" />
1024            <Tab icon={<PeopleIcon />} iconPosition="start" label="Personen" />
1025            <Tab icon={<TaskAltIcon />} iconPosition="start" label="Schaden" />
1026            <Tab icon={<NoteIcon />} iconPosition="start" label="Notizen" />
1027            <Tab icon={<CheckBoxOutlineBlankIcon />} iconPosition="start" label="Aufgaben" />
1028            <Tab icon={<AttachFileIcon />} iconPosition="start" label="Dateien" />
