1029            <Tab icon={<HistoryIcon />} iconPosition="start" label="Protokoll" />
1030          </Tabs>
1031        </Box>
1032
1033        <CardContent>
1034          <TabPanel value={tab} index={0}><UnfalldatenTab gutachtenId={id} /></TabPanel>
1035          <TabPanel value={tab} index={1}><FahrzeugeTab gutachtenId={id} /></TabPanel>
1036          <TabPanel value={tab} index={2}><PersonenTab gutachtenId={id} /></TabPanel>
1037          <TabPanel value={tab} index={3}><SchadenTab gutachtenId={id} /></TabPanel>
1038          <TabPanel value={tab} index={4}><NotizenTab gutachtenId={id} /></TabPanel>
1039          <TabPanel value={tab} index={5}><AufgabenTab gutachtenId={id} /></TabPanel>
1040          <TabPanel value={tab} index={6}><DateienTab gutachtenId={id} /></TabPanel>
1041          <TabPanel value={tab} index={7}><AuditTab gutachtenId={id} /></TabPanel>
1042        </CardContent>
1043      </Card>
1044    </Box>
1045  );
1046}
1047
page.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/gutachten/new/page.tsx 181 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
  1/**
  2 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/gutachten/new/page.tsx
  3 * @description Seite: Neues Gutachten erstellen.
  4 */
  5
  6'use client';
  7
  8import React, { useState } from 'react';
  9
 10import ArrowBackIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ArrowBack';
 11import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
 12import Button from '@mui/material/Button';
 13import Card from '@mui/material/Card';
 14import CardContent from '@mui/material/CardContent';
 15import CardHeader from '@mui/material/CardHeader';
 16import CircularProgress from '@mui/material/CircularProgress';
 17import MenuItem from '@mui/material/MenuItem';
 18import TextField from '@mui/material/TextField';
 19import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';
 20import Link from 'next/link';
 21import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
 22
 23import { gutachtenApi, type GutachtenStatus } from '@/lib/api/gutachten.api';
 24
 25const STATUS_OPTIONS: Array<{ value: GutachtenStatus; label: string }> = [
 26  { value: 'AUFGENOMMEN', label: 'Aufgenommen' },
 27  { value: 'BEAUFTRAGT', label: 'Beauftragt' },
 28  { value: 'BESICHTIGUNG', label: 'Besichtigung' },
 29  { value: 'ENTWURF', label: 'Entwurf' },
 30];
 31
 32export default function NewGutachtenPage(): React.JSX.Element {
 33  const router = useRouter();
 34  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
 35  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 36  const [form, setForm] = useState({
 37    titel: '',
 38    aktenzeichen: '',
 39    status: 'AUFGENOMMEN' as GutachtenStatus,
 40    beschreibung: '',
 41    frist: '',
 42    auftragsdatum: '',
 43  });
 44
 45  const handleChange = (field: keyof typeof form) => (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
 46    setForm((prev) => ({ ...prev, [field]: e.target.value }));
 47  };
 48
 49  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
 50    e.preventDefault();
 51    if (!form.titel.trim()) {
 52      setError('Bitte geben Sie einen Titel ein.');
 53      return;
 54    }
 55    setLoading(true);
 56    setError(null);
 57    try {
 58      const gutachten = await gutachtenApi.create({
 59        titel: form.titel,
 60        aktenzeichen: form.aktenzeichen || undefined,
 61        status: form.status,
 62        beschreibung: form.beschreibung || undefined,
 63        frist: form.frist ? new Date(form.frist).toISOString() : null,
 64        auftragsdatum: form.auftragsdatum ? new Date(form.auftragsdatum).toISOString() : null,
 65      });
 66      router.push(`/gutachten/${gutachten.id}`);
 67    } catch (err: unknown) {
 68      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Fehler beim Erstellen des Gutachtens.');
 69      setLoading(false);
 70    }
 71  };
 72
 73  return (
 74    <Box>
 75      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 2, mb: 3 }}>
 76        <Button
 77          startIcon={<ArrowBackIcon />}
 78          component={Link}
 79          href="/gutachten"
 80          color="inherit"
 81        >
 82          Zurück
 83        </Button>
 84        <Typography variant="h4" fontWeight={700}>
 85          Neues Gutachten
 86        </Typography>
 87      </Box>
 88
 89      <Card sx={{ maxWidth: 800 }}>
 90        <CardHeader title="Gutachten-Details" />
 91        <CardContent>
 92          <Box component="form" onSubmit={handleSubmit} sx={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 2 }}>
 93            {error && (
 94              <Typography color="error" variant="body2">
 95                {error}
 96              </Typography>
 97            )}
 98
 99            <TextField
100              label="Titel *"
101              value={form.titel}
102              onChange={handleChange('titel')}
103              required
104              fullWidth
105              helperText="Kurze Beschreibung des Gutachtens"
106            />
107
108            <TextField
109              label="Aktenzeichen"
110              value={form.aktenzeichen}
111              onChange={handleChange('aktenzeichen')}
112              fullWidth
113              helperText="Leer lassen für automatische Vergabe (z.B. GA-2026-001)"
114            />
115
116            <TextField
117              label="Status"
118              value={form.status}
119              onChange={handleChange('status')}
120              select
121              fullWidth
122            >
123              {STATUS_OPTIONS.map((opt) => (
124                <MenuItem key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>
125                  {opt.label}
126                </MenuItem>
127              ))}
128            </TextField>
129
130            <TextField
131              label="Auftragsdatum"
132              type="date"
133              value={form.auftragsdatum}
134              onChange={handleChange('auftragsdatum')}
135              fullWidth
136              InputLabelProps={{ shrink: true }}
137            />
138
139            <TextField
140              label="Frist"
141              type="date"
142              value={form.frist}
143              onChange={handleChange('frist')}
144              fullWidth
145              InputLabelProps={{ shrink: true }}
146            />
147
148            <TextField
149              label="Beschreibung"
150              value={form.beschreibung}
151              onChange={handleChange('beschreibung')}
152              multiline
153              rows={4}
154              fullWidth
155            />
156
157            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: 2, justifyContent: 'flex-end', mt: 2 }}>
158              <Button
159                variant="outlined"
160                component={Link}
161                href="/gutachten"
162                disabled={loading}
163              >
164                Abbrechen
165              </Button>
166              <Button
167                type="submit"
168                variant="contained"
169                disabled={loading}
170                startIcon={loading ? <CircularProgress size={16} /> : undefined}
171              >
172                Gutachten erstellen
173              </Button>
174            </Box>
175          </Box>
176        </CardContent>
177      </Card>
178    </Box>
179  );
180}
181
page.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/gutachten/page.tsx 191 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
  1/**
  2 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/gutachten/page.tsx
  3 * @description Gutachten-Listenansicht.
  4 */
  5
  6'use client';
  7
  8import React, { useState } from 'react';
  9
 10import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
 11import SearchIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Search';
 12import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
 13import Button from '@mui/material/Button';
 14import Chip from '@mui/material/Chip';
 15import CircularProgress from '@mui/material/CircularProgress';
 16import InputAdornment from '@mui/material/InputAdornment';
 17import Paper from '@mui/material/Paper';
 18import Table from '@mui/material/Table';
 19import TableBody from '@mui/material/TableBody';
 20import TableCell from '@mui/material/TableCell';
 21import TableContainer from '@mui/material/TableContainer';
 22import TableHead from '@mui/material/TableHead';
 23import TablePagination from '@mui/material/TablePagination';
 24import TableRow from '@mui/material/TableRow';
 25import TextField from '@mui/material/TextField';
 26import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';
 27import Link from 'next/link';
 28import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
 29
 30import { gutachtenApi, type GutachtenStatus } from '@/lib/api/gutachten.api';
 31
 32const STATUS_LABELS: Record<GutachtenStatus, string> = {
 33  AUFGENOMMEN: 'Aufgenommen',
 34  BEAUFTRAGT: 'Beauftragt',
 35  BESICHTIGUNG: 'Besichtigung',
 36  ENTWURF: 'Entwurf',
 37  FREIGABE: 'Freigabe',
 38  FERTIG: 'Fertig',
 39  ARCHIV: 'Archiv',
 40};
 41
 42const STATUS_COLORS: Record<GutachtenStatus, 'default' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'error' | 'info' | 'success' | 'warning'> = {
 43  AUFGENOMMEN: 'default',
 44  BEAUFTRAGT: 'info',
 45  BESICHTIGUNG: 'primary',
 46  ENTWURF: 'warning',
 47  FREIGABE: 'secondary',
 48  FERTIG: 'success',
 49  ARCHIV: 'default',
 50};
 51
 52export default function GutachtenListePage(): React.JSX.Element {
 53  const router = useRouter();
 54  const [page, setPage] = useState(0);
 55  const [rowsPerPage, setRowsPerPage] = useState(20);
 56  const [suche, setSuche] = useState('');
 57  const [data, setData] = React.useState<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof gutachtenApi.list>> | null>(null);
 58  const [loading, setLoading] = React.useState(true);
 59  const [error, setError] = React.useState<string | null>(null);
 60
 61  React.useEffect(() => {
 62    setLoading(true);
 63    gutachtenApi
 64      .list({ page: page + 1, pageSize: rowsPerPage, suche: suche || undefined })
 65      .then(setData)
 66      .catch((err: Error) => setError(err.message))
 67      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
 68  }, [page, rowsPerPage, suche]);
 69
 70  return (
 71    <Box>
 72      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', mb: 3 }}>
 73        <Typography variant="h4" fontWeight={700}>
 74          Gutachten
 75        </Typography>
 76        <Button
 77          variant="contained"
 78          startIcon={<AddIcon />}
 79          component={Link}
 80          href="/gutachten/new"
 81        >
 82          Neues Gutachten
 83        </Button>
 84      </Box>
 85
 86      <Paper sx={{ mb: 2, p: 2 }}>
 87        <TextField
 88          fullWidth
 89          size="small"
 90          placeholder="Suchen nach Aktenzeichen, Titel..."
 91          value={suche}
 92          onChange={(e) => { setSuche(e.target.value); setPage(0); }}
 93          InputProps={{
 94            startAdornment: (
 95              <InputAdornment position="start">
 96                <SearchIcon />
 97              </InputAdornment>
 98            ),
 99          }}
100        />
101      </Paper>
102
103      <TableContainer component={Paper}>
104        {loading ? (
105          <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', p: 4 }}>
106            <CircularProgress />
107          </Box>
108        ) : error ? (
109          <Box sx={{ p: 4, textAlign: 'center' }}>
110            <Typography color="error">{error}</Typography>
111          </Box>
112        ) : (
113          <>
114            <Table>
115              <TableHead>
116                <TableRow>
117                  <TableCell>Aktenzeichen</TableCell>
118                  <TableCell>Titel</TableCell>
119                  <TableCell>Status</TableCell>
120                  <TableCell>Auftraggeber</TableCell>
121                  <TableCell>Gutachter</TableCell>
122                  <TableCell>Frist</TableCell>
123                </TableRow>
124              </TableHead>
125              <TableBody>
126                {data?.gutachten.map((g) => (
127                  <TableRow
128                    key={g.id}
129                    hover
130                    sx={{ cursor: 'pointer' }}
131                    onClick={() => router.push(`/gutachten/${g.id}`)}
132                  >
133                    <TableCell>
134                      <Typography variant="body2" fontWeight={600} color="primary">
135                        {g.aktenzeichen}
136                      </Typography>
137                    </TableCell>
138                    <TableCell>{g.titel}</TableCell>
139                    <TableCell>
140                      <Chip
141                        label={STATUS_LABELS[g.status]}
142                        color={STATUS_COLORS[g.status]}
143                        size="small"
144                      />
145                    </TableCell>
146                    <TableCell>
147                      {g.kunde
148                        ? `${g.kunde.vorname ?? ''} ${g.kunde.nachname}`.trim()
149                        : '—'}
150                    </TableCell>
151                    <TableCell>
152                      {g.gutachter
153                        ? `${g.gutachter.vorname} ${g.gutachter.nachname}`
154                        : '—'}
155                    </TableCell>
156                    <TableCell>
157                      {g.frist
158                        ? new Date(g.frist).toLocaleDateString('de-DE')
159                        : '—'}
160                    </TableCell>
161                  </TableRow>
162                ))}
163                {(!data?.gutachten.length) && (
164                  <TableRow>
165                    <TableCell colSpan={6} align="center" sx={{ py: 4 }}>
166                      <Typography color="text.secondary">
167                        Keine Gutachten gefunden.
168                      </Typography>
169                    </TableCell>
170                  </TableRow>
171                )}
172              </TableBody>
173            </Table>
174            <TablePagination
175              component="div"
176              count={data?.meta.total ?? 0}
177              page={page}
178              onPageChange={(_, newPage) => setPage(newPage)}
179              rowsPerPage={rowsPerPage}
180              onRowsPerPageChange={(e) => { setRowsPerPage(parseInt(e.target.value, 10)); setPage(0); }}
181              rowsPerPageOptions={[10, 20, 50]}
182              labelRowsPerPage="Zeilen pro Seite:"
183              labelDisplayedRows={({ from, to, count }) => `${from}–${to} von ${count}`}
184            />
185          </>
186        )}
187      </TableContainer>
188    </Box>
189  );
190}
191
page.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/gutachter/[id]/edit/page.tsx 176 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
  1/**
  2 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/gutachter/[id]/edit/page.tsx
  3 * @description Gutachter bearbeiten.
  4 */
  5
  6'use client';
  7
  8import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  9
 10import ArrowBackIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ArrowBack';
 11import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
 12import Button from '@mui/material/Button';
 13import Card from '@mui/material/Card';
 14import CardContent from '@mui/material/CardContent';
 15import CardHeader from '@mui/material/CardHeader';
 16import CircularProgress from '@mui/material/CircularProgress';
 17import Grid from '@mui/material/Grid';
 18import TextField from '@mui/material/TextField';
 19import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';
 20import Link from 'next/link';
 21import { useParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
 22
 23import { gutachterApi } from '@/lib/api/gutachter.api';
 24
 25export default function GutachterEditPage(): React.JSX.Element {
 26  const params = useParams();
 27  const router = useRouter();
 28  const id = params.id as string;
 29
 30  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 31  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
 32  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 33  const [form, setForm] = useState({
 34    vorname: '',
 35    nachname: '',
 36    email: '',
 37    telefon: '',
 38    fachgebiet: '',
 39  });
 40
 41  useEffect(() => {
 42    gutachterApi
 43      .findById(id)
 44      .then((g) => {
 45        setForm({
 46          vorname: g.vorname,
 47          nachname: g.nachname,
 48          email: g.email ?? '',
 49          telefon: g.telefon ?? '',
 50          fachgebiet: g.fachgebiet ?? '',
 51        });
 52      })
 53      .catch((err: Error) => setError(err.message))
 54      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
 55  }, [id]);
 56
 57  const handleChange = (field: keyof typeof form) => (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
 58    setForm((prev) => ({ ...prev, [field]: e.target.value }));
 59  };
 60
 61  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
 62    e.preventDefault();
 63    if (!form.vorname.trim() || !form.nachname.trim()) {
 64      setError('Vor- und Nachname sind Pflichtfelder.');
 65      return;
 66    }
 67    setSaving(true);
 68    setError(null);
 69    try {
 70      await gutachterApi.update(id, {
 71        vorname: form.vorname,
 72        nachname: form.nachname,
 73        email: form.email || undefined,
 74        telefon: form.telefon || undefined,
 75        fachgebiet: form.fachgebiet || undefined,
 76      });
 77      router.push(`/gutachter/${id}`);
 78    } catch (err: unknown) {
 79      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Fehler beim Speichern.');
 80      setSaving(false);
 81    }
 82  };
 83
 84  if (loading) {
 85    return (
 86      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 8 }}>
 87        <CircularProgress />
 88      </Box>
 89    );
 90  }
 91
 92  return (
 93    <Box>
 94      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 2, mb: 3 }}>
 95        <Button startIcon={<ArrowBackIcon />} component={Link} href={`/gutachter/${id}`} color="inherit">
 96          Zurück
 97        </Button>
 98        <Typography variant="h4" fontWeight={700}>
 99          Gutachter bearbeiten
100        </Typography>
101      </Box>
102
103      <Card sx={{ maxWidth: 700 }}>
104        <CardHeader title="Gutachterdaten" />
105        <CardContent>
106          <Box component="form" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
107            {error && (
108              <Typography color="error" variant="body2" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
109                {error}
110              </Typography>
111            )}
112            <Grid container spacing={2}>
113              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
114                <TextField
115                  label="Vorname *"
116                  value={form.vorname}
117                  onChange={handleChange('vorname')}
118                  required
119                  fullWidth
120                />
121              </Grid>
122              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
123                <TextField
124                  label="Nachname *"
125                  value={form.nachname}
126                  onChange={handleChange('nachname')}
127                  required
128                  fullWidth
129                />
130              </Grid>
131              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
132                <TextField
133                  label="E-Mail"
134                  type="email"
135                  value={form.email}
136                  onChange={handleChange('email')}
137                  fullWidth
138                />
139              </Grid>
140              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
141                <TextField
142                  label="Telefon"
143                  value={form.telefon}
144                  onChange={handleChange('telefon')}
145                  fullWidth
146                />
147              </Grid>
148              <Grid item xs={12}>
149                <TextField
150                  label="Fachgebiet"
151                  value={form.fachgebiet}
152                  onChange={handleChange('fachgebiet')}
153                  fullWidth
154                />
155              </Grid>
156            </Grid>
157            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: 2, justifyContent: 'flex-end', mt: 3 }}>
158              <Button variant="outlined" component={Link} href={`/gutachter/${id}`} disabled={saving}>
159                Abbrechen
160              </Button>
161              <Button
162                type="submit"
163                variant="contained"
164                disabled={saving}
165                startIcon={saving ? <CircularProgress size={16} /> : undefined}
166              >
167                Speichern
168              </Button>
169            </Box>
170          </Box>
171        </CardContent>
172      </Card>
173    </Box>
174  );
175}
176
page.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/gutachter/[id]/page.tsx 269 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
  1/**
  2 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/gutachter/[id]/page.tsx
  3 * @description Gutachter-Detailansicht.
  4 */
  5
  6'use client';
  7
  8import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  9
 10import ArrowBackIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ArrowBack';
 11import DeleteIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Delete';
 12import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
 13import EmailIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Email';
 14import PhoneIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Phone';
 15import WorkIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Work';
 16import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
 17import Button from '@mui/material/Button';
 18import Card from '@mui/material/Card';
 19import CardContent from '@mui/material/CardContent';
 20import CardHeader from '@mui/material/CardHeader';
 21import Chip from '@mui/material/Chip';
 22import CircularProgress from '@mui/material/CircularProgress';
 23import Dialog from '@mui/material/Dialog';
 24import DialogActions from '@mui/material/DialogActions';
 25import DialogContent from '@mui/material/DialogContent';
 26import DialogTitle from '@mui/material/DialogTitle';
 27import Divider from '@mui/material/Divider';
 28import Grid from '@mui/material/Grid';
 29import List from '@mui/material/List';
 30import ListItem from '@mui/material/ListItem';
 31import ListItemText from '@mui/material/ListItemText';
 32import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';
 33import Link from 'next/link';
 34import { useParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
 35
 36import { gutachterApi, type Gutachter } from '@/lib/api/gutachter.api';
 37import { gutachtenApi, type Gutachten } from '@/lib/api/gutachten.api';
 38
 39const STATUS_COLORS: Record<string, 'default' | 'primary' | 'warning' | 'success' | 'error'> = {
 40  AUFGENOMMEN: 'default',
 41  BEAUFTRAGT: 'primary',
 42  BESICHTIGUNG: 'primary',
 43  ENTWURF: 'warning',
 44  FREIGABE: 'warning',
 45  FERTIG: 'success',
 46  ARCHIV: 'default',
 47};
 48
 49const STATUS_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
 50  AUFGENOMMEN: 'Aufgenommen',
 51  BEAUFTRAGT: 'Beauftragt',
 52  BESICHTIGUNG: 'Besichtigung',
 53  ENTWURF: 'Entwurf',
 54  FREIGABE: 'Freigabe',
 55  FERTIG: 'Fertig',
 56  ARCHIV: 'Archiviert',
 57};
 58
 59export default function GutachterDetailPage(): React.JSX.Element {
 60  const params = useParams();
 61  const router = useRouter();
 62  const id = params.id as string;
 63
 64  const [gutachter, setGutachter] = useState<Gutachter | null>(null);
 65  const [gutachten, setGutachten] = useState<Gutachten[]>([]);
 66  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 67  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 68  const [deleteOpen, setDeleteOpen] = useState(false);
 69  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);
 70
 71  useEffect(() => {
 72    Promise.all([
 73      gutachterApi.findById(id),
 74      gutachtenApi.list({ gutachterId: id, pageSize: 50 }),
 75    ])
 76      .then(([g, gList]) => {
 77        setGutachter(g);
 78        setGutachten(gList.gutachten);
 79      })
 80      .catch((err: Error) => setError(err.message))
 81      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
 82  }, [id]);
 83
 84  const handleDelete = async () => {
 85    setDeleting(true);
 86    try {
 87      await gutachterApi.delete(id);
 88      router.push('/gutachter');
 89    } catch (err: unknown) {
 90      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Fehler beim Löschen.');
 91      setDeleting(false);
 92      setDeleteOpen(false);
 93    }
 94  };
 95
 96  if (loading) {
 97    return (
 98      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 8 }}>
 99        <CircularProgress />
100      </Box>
101    );
102  }
103
104  if (error || !gutachter) {
105    return (
106      <Box>
107        <Typography color="error">{error ?? 'Gutachter nicht gefunden.'}</Typography>
108        <Button startIcon={<ArrowBackIcon />} component={Link} href="/gutachter" sx={{ mt: 2 }}>
109          Zurück
110        </Button>
111      </Box>
112    );
113  }
114
115  return (
116    <Box>
117      {/* Header */}
118      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'space-between', mb: 3 }}>
119        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 2 }}>
120          <Button startIcon={<ArrowBackIcon />} component={Link} href="/gutachter" color="inherit">
121            Zurück
122          </Button>
123          <Typography variant="h4" fontWeight={700}>
124            {gutachter.vorname} {gutachter.nachname}
125          </Typography>
126        </Box>
127        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: 1 }}>
128          <Button
129            variant="outlined"
130            startIcon={<EditIcon />}
131            component={Link}
132            href={`/gutachter/${id}/edit`}
133          >
134            Bearbeiten
135          </Button>
136          <Button
137            variant="outlined"
138            color="error"
139            startIcon={<DeleteIcon />}
140            onClick={() => setDeleteOpen(true)}
141          >
142            Löschen
143          </Button>
144        </Box>
145      </Box>
146
147      <Grid container spacing={3}>
148        {/* Stammdaten */}
149        <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
150          <Card>
151            <CardHeader title="Kontaktdaten" />
152            <CardContent>
153              {gutachter.email && (
154                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1, mb: 1.5 }}>
155                  <EmailIcon fontSize="small" color="action" />
156                  <Typography variant="body2">
157                    <a href={`mailto:${gutachter.email}`} style={{ color: 'inherit' }}>
158                      {gutachter.email}
159                    </a>
160                  </Typography>
161                </Box>
162              )}
163              {gutachter.telefon && (
164                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1, mb: 1.5 }}>
165                  <PhoneIcon fontSize="small" color="action" />
166                  <Typography variant="body2">{gutachter.telefon}</Typography>
167                </Box>
168              )}
169              {gutachter.fachgebiet && (
170                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'flex-start', gap: 1 }}>
171                  <WorkIcon fontSize="small" color="action" sx={{ mt: 0.3 }} />
172                  <Typography variant="body2">{gutachter.fachgebiet}</Typography>
173                </Box>
174              )}
175              {!gutachter.email && !gutachter.telefon && !gutachter.fachgebiet && (
176                <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary">Keine Kontaktdaten hinterlegt.</Typography>
177              )}
178            </CardContent>
179          </Card>
180
181          <Card sx={{ mt: 2 }}>
182            <CardContent>
183              <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">Erstellt</Typography>
184              <Typography variant="body2">
185                {new Date(gutachter.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('de-DE', {
186                  day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit', year: 'numeric',
187                })}
188              </Typography>
189            </CardContent>
190          </Card>
191        </Grid>
192
193        {/* Gutachten-Liste */}
194        <Grid item xs={12} md={8}>
195          <Card>
196            <CardHeader
197              title={`Gutachten (${gutachten.length})`}
198              action={
199                <Button
200                  size="small"
201                  variant="outlined"
202                  component={Link}
203                  href={`/gutachten/new?gutachterId=${id}`}
204                >
205                  Neues Gutachten
206                </Button>
207              }
208            />
209            <Divider />
210            {gutachten.length === 0 ? (
211              <CardContent>
212                <Typography color="text.secondary" variant="body2">
213                  Noch keine Gutachten für diesen Gutachter.
214                </Typography>
215              </CardContent>
216            ) : (
217              <List disablePadding>
218                {gutachten.map((g, i) => (
219                  <React.Fragment key={g.id}>
220                    {i > 0 && <Divider component="li" />}
221                    <ListItem
222                      component={Link}
223                      href={`/gutachten/${g.id}`}
224                      sx={{ '&:hover': { bgcolor: 'action.hover' }, textDecoration: 'none', color: 'inherit' }}
225                    >
226                      <ListItemText
227                        primary={
228                          <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1 }}>
229                            <Typography fontWeight={600}>{g.titel}</Typography>
230                            <Chip
231                              label={STATUS_LABELS[g.status] ?? g.status}
232                              color={STATUS_COLORS[g.status] ?? 'default'}
233                              size="small"
234                            />
235                          </Box>
236                        }
237                        secondary={g.aktenzeichen}
238                      />
239                    </ListItem>
240                  </React.Fragment>
241                ))}
242              </List>
243            )}
244          </Card>
245        </Grid>
246      </Grid>
247
248      {/* Löschen-Dialog */}
249      <Dialog open={deleteOpen} onClose={() => setDeleteOpen(false)} maxWidth="xs" fullWidth>
250        <DialogTitle>Gutachter löschen?</DialogTitle>
251        <DialogContent>
252          <Typography>
253            Soll <strong>{gutachter.vorname} {gutachter.nachname}</strong> wirklich gelöscht werden?
254            {gutachten.length > 0 && (
255              <> Es sind noch <strong>{gutachten.length} Gutachten</strong> diesem Gutachter zugeordnet.</>
256            )}
257          </Typography>
258        </DialogContent>
259        <DialogActions>
260          <Button onClick={() => setDeleteOpen(false)}>Abbrechen</Button>
261          <Button variant="contained" color="error" onClick={handleDelete} disabled={deleting}>
262            Löschen
263          </Button>
264        </DialogActions>
265      </Dialog>
266    </Box>
267  );
268}
269
page.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/gutachter/new/page.tsx 149 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
  1/**
  2 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/gutachter/new/page.tsx
  3 * @description Neuen Gutachter anlegen.
  4 */
  5
  6'use client';
  7
  8import React, { useState } from 'react';
  9
 10import ArrowBackIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ArrowBack';
 11import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
 12import Button from '@mui/material/Button';
 13import Card from '@mui/material/Card';
 14import CardContent from '@mui/material/CardContent';
 15import CardHeader from '@mui/material/CardHeader';
 16import CircularProgress from '@mui/material/CircularProgress';
 17import Grid from '@mui/material/Grid';
 18import TextField from '@mui/material/TextField';
 19import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';
 20import Link from 'next/link';
 21import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
 22
 23import { gutachterApi } from '@/lib/api/gutachter.api';
 24
 25export default function NewGutachterPage(): React.JSX.Element {
 26  const router = useRouter();
 27  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
 28  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 29  const [form, setForm] = useState({
 30    vorname: '',
 31    nachname: '',
 32    email: '',
 33    telefon: '',
 34    fachgebiet: '',
 35  });
 36
 37  const handleChange = (field: keyof typeof form) => (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
 38    setForm((prev) => ({ ...prev, [field]: e.target.value }));
 39  };
 40
 41  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
 42    e.preventDefault();
 43    if (!form.vorname.trim() || !form.nachname.trim()) {
 44      setError('Vor- und Nachname sind Pflichtfelder.');
 45      return;
 46    }
 47    setSaving(true);
 48    setError(null);
 49    try {
 50      const g = await gutachterApi.create({
 51        vorname: form.vorname,
 52        nachname: form.nachname,
 53        email: form.email || undefined,
 54        telefon: form.telefon || undefined,
 55        fachgebiet: form.fachgebiet || undefined,
 56      });
 57      router.push(`/gutachter/${g.id}`);
 58    } catch (err: unknown) {
 59      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Fehler beim Erstellen.');
 60      setSaving(false);
 61    }
 62  };
 63
 64  return (
 65    <Box>
 66      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 2, mb: 3 }}>
 67        <Button startIcon={<ArrowBackIcon />} component={Link} href="/gutachter" color="inherit">
 68          Zurück
 69        </Button>
 70        <Typography variant="h4" fontWeight={700}>
 71          Neuer Gutachter
 72        </Typography>
 73      </Box>
 74
 75      <Card sx={{ maxWidth: 700 }}>
 76        <CardHeader title="Gutachterdaten" />
 77        <CardContent>
 78          <Box component="form" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
 79            {error && (
 80              <Typography color="error" variant="body2" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
 81                {error}
 82              </Typography>
 83            )}
 84            <Grid container spacing={2}>
 85              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
 86                <TextField
 87                  label="Vorname *"
 88                  value={form.vorname}
 89                  onChange={handleChange('vorname')}
 90                  required
 91                  fullWidth
 92                />
 93              </Grid>
 94              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
 95                <TextField
 96                  label="Nachname *"
 97                  value={form.nachname}
 98                  onChange={handleChange('nachname')}
 99                  required
100                  fullWidth
101                />
102              </Grid>
103              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
104                <TextField
105                  label="E-Mail"
106                  type="email"
107                  value={form.email}
108                  onChange={handleChange('email')}
109                  fullWidth
110                />
111              </Grid>
112              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
113                <TextField
114                  label="Telefon"
115                  value={form.telefon}
116                  onChange={handleChange('telefon')}
117                  fullWidth
118                />
119              </Grid>
120              <Grid item xs={12}>
121                <TextField
122                  label="Fachgebiet"
123                  value={form.fachgebiet}
124                  onChange={handleChange('fachgebiet')}
125                  placeholder="z.B. Unfallanalyse, KFZ-Bewertung"
126                  fullWidth
127                />
128              </Grid>
129            </Grid>
130            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: 2, justifyContent: 'flex-end', mt: 3 }}>
131              <Button variant="outlined" component={Link} href="/gutachter" disabled={saving}>
132                Abbrechen
133              </Button>
134              <Button
135                type="submit"
136                variant="contained"
137                disabled={saving}
138                startIcon={saving ? <CircularProgress size={16} /> : undefined}
139              >
140                Gutachter anlegen
141              </Button>
142            </Box>
143          </Box>
144        </CardContent>
145      </Card>
146    </Box>
147  );
148}
149
page.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/gutachter/page.tsx 113 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
  1/**
  2 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/gutachter/page.tsx
  3 * @description Gutachter-Listenansicht.
  4 */
  5
  6'use client';
  7
  8import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  9
 10import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
 11import BadgeIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Badge';
 12import EmailIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Email';
 13import PhoneIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Phone';
 14import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
 15import Button from '@mui/material/Button';
 16import Card from '@mui/material/Card';
 17import CardActionArea from '@mui/material/CardActionArea';
 18import CardContent from '@mui/material/CardContent';
 19import Chip from '@mui/material/Chip';
 20import CircularProgress from '@mui/material/CircularProgress';
 21import Grid from '@mui/material/Grid';
 22import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';
 23import Link from 'next/link';
 24
 25import { gutachterApi, type Gutachter } from '@/lib/api/gutachter.api';
 26
 27export default function GutachterPage(): React.JSX.Element {
 28  const [gutachter, setGutachter] = useState<Gutachter[]>([]);
 29  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 30  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 31
 32  useEffect(() => {
 33    gutachterApi
 34      .list()
 35      .then((res) => setGutachter(res.gutachter))
 36      .catch((err: Error) => setError(err.message))
 37      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
 38  }, []);
 39
 40  return (
 41    <Box>
 42      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', mb: 3 }}>
 43        <Typography variant="h4" fontWeight={700}>
 44          Gutachter
 45        </Typography>
 46        <Button variant="contained" startIcon={<AddIcon />} component={Link} href="/gutachter/new">
 47          Neuer Gutachter
 48        </Button>
 49      </Box>
 50
 51      {loading ? (
 52        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 4 }}>
 53          <CircularProgress />
 54        </Box>
 55      ) : error ? (
 56        <Typography color="error">{error}</Typography>
 57      ) : gutachter.length === 0 ? (
 58        <Card>
 59          <CardContent sx={{ textAlign: 'center', py: 6 }}>
 60            <BadgeIcon sx={{ fontSize: 48, color: 'text.disabled', mb: 1 }} />
 61            <Typography color="text.secondary" gutterBottom>
 62              Noch keine Gutachter angelegt.
 63            </Typography>
 64            <Button variant="outlined" component={Link} href="/gutachter/new">
 65              Ersten Gutachter anlegen
 66            </Button>
 67          </CardContent>
 68        </Card>
 69      ) : (
 70        <Grid container spacing={2}>
 71          {gutachter.map((g) => (
 72            <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={4} key={g.id}>
 73              <Card sx={{ height: '100%' }}>
 74                <CardActionArea component={Link} href={`/gutachter/${g.id}`} sx={{ height: '100%' }}>
 75                  <CardContent>
 76                    <Typography variant="h6" fontWeight={600} gutterBottom>
 77                      {g.vorname} {g.nachname}
 78                    </Typography>
 79                    {g.fachgebiet && (
 80                      <Chip
 81                        label={g.fachgebiet}
 82                        size="small"
 83                        variant="outlined"
 84                        sx={{ mb: 1.5, maxWidth: '100%' }}
 85                      />
 86                    )}
 87                    {g.email && (
 88                      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 0.75, mb: 0.5 }}>
 89                        <EmailIcon fontSize="small" color="action" />
 90                        <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary" noWrap>
 91                          {g.email}
 92                        </Typography>
 93                      </Box>
 94                    )}
 95                    {g.telefon && (
 96                      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 0.75 }}>
 97                        <PhoneIcon fontSize="small" color="action" />
 98                        <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary">
 99                          {g.telefon}
100                        </Typography>
101                      </Box>
102                    )}
103                  </CardContent>
104                </CardActionArea>
105              </Card>
106            </Grid>
107          ))}
108        </Grid>
109      )}
110    </Box>
111  );
112}
113
page.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/kalender/page.tsx 243 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
  1/**
  2 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/kalender/page.tsx
  3 * @description Kalender-Ansicht mit Terminen.
  4 */
  5
  6'use client';
  7
  8import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  9
 10import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
 11import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
 12import Button from '@mui/material/Button';
 13import Card from '@mui/material/Card';
 14import CardContent from '@mui/material/CardContent';
 15import Chip from '@mui/material/Chip';
 16import CircularProgress from '@mui/material/CircularProgress';
 17import Dialog from '@mui/material/Dialog';
 18import DialogActions from '@mui/material/DialogActions';
 19import DialogContent from '@mui/material/DialogContent';
 20import DialogTitle from '@mui/material/DialogTitle';
 21import List from '@mui/material/List';
 22import ListItem from '@mui/material/ListItem';
 23import ListItemText from '@mui/material/ListItemText';
 24import TextField from '@mui/material/TextField';
 25import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';
 26
 27import { termineApi, type Termin } from '@/lib/api/termine.api';
 28
 29export default function KalenderPage(): React.JSX.Element {
 30  const [termine, setTermine] = useState<Termin[]>([]);
 31  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 32  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 33  const [dialogOpen, setDialogOpen] = useState(false);
 34  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
 35  const [newTermin, setNewTermin] = useState({
 36    titel: '',
 37    start: '',
 38    ende: '',
 39    ort: '',
 40    beschreibung: '',
 41  });
 42
 43  const loadTermine = () => {
 44    const now = new Date();
 45    const in90Days = new Date(now.getTime() + 90 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
 46    setLoading(true);
 47    termineApi
 48      .list({ von: now.toISOString(), bis: in90Days.toISOString() })
 49      .then(setTermine)
 50      .catch((err: Error) => setError(err.message))
 51      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
 52  };
 53
 54  useEffect(loadTermine, []);
 55
 56  const handleSave = async () => {
 57    if (!newTermin.titel || !newTermin.start || !newTermin.ende) { return; }
 58    setSaving(true);
 59    try {
 60      await termineApi.create({
 61        titel: newTermin.titel,
 62        start: new Date(newTermin.start).toISOString(),
 63        ende: new Date(newTermin.ende).toISOString(),
 64        ort: newTermin.ort || undefined,
 65        beschreibung: newTermin.beschreibung || undefined,
 66      });
 67      setDialogOpen(false);
 68      setNewTermin({ titel: '', start: '', ende: '', ort: '', beschreibung: '' });
 69      loadTermine();
 70    } catch (err: unknown) {
 71      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Fehler beim Speichern.');
 72    } finally {
 73      setSaving(false);
 74    }
 75  };
 76
 77  // Termine nach Datum gruppieren
 78  const termineByDate = termine.reduce<Record<string, Termin[]>>((acc, t) => {
 79    const date = new Date(t.start).toLocaleDateString('de-DE', {
 80      weekday: 'long',
 81      year: 'numeric',
 82      month: 'long',
 83      day: 'numeric',
 84    });
 85    if (!acc[date]) { acc[date] = []; }
 86    acc[date].push(t);
 87    return acc;
 88  }, {});
 89
 90  return (
 91    <Box>
 92      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', mb: 3 }}>
 93        <Typography variant="h4" fontWeight={700}>
 94          Kalender
 95        </Typography>
 96        <Button variant="contained" startIcon={<AddIcon />} onClick={() => setDialogOpen(true)}>
 97          Neuer Termin
 98        </Button>
 99      </Box>
100
101      {loading ? (
102        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 4 }}>
103          <CircularProgress />
104        </Box>
105      ) : error ? (
106        <Typography color="error">{error}</Typography>
107      ) : termine.length === 0 ? (
108        <Card>
109          <CardContent sx={{ textAlign: 'center', py: 6 }}>
110            <Typography color="text.secondary">
111              Keine Termine in den nächsten 90 Tagen.
112            </Typography>
113            <Button variant="outlined" sx={{ mt: 2 }} onClick={() => setDialogOpen(true)}>
114              Ersten Termin erstellen
115            </Button>
116          </CardContent>
117        </Card>
118      ) : (
119        Object.entries(termineByDate).map(([date, tList]) => (
120          <Box key={date} sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
121            <Typography variant="h6" color="text.secondary" sx={{ mb: 1 }}>
122              {date}
123            </Typography>
124            <Card>
125              <List dense>
126                {tList.map((t, idx) => (
127                  <ListItem
128                    key={t.id}
129                    sx={{
130                      borderBottom: idx < tList.length - 1 ? '1px solid' : 'none',
131                      borderColor: 'divider',
132                    }}
133                  >
134                    <Box
135                      sx={{
136                        width: 4,
137                        height: 40,
138                        borderRadius: 1,
139                        bgcolor: t.farbe ?? 'primary.main',
140                        mr: 2,
141                        flexShrink: 0,
142                      }}
143                    />
144                    <ListItemText
145                      primary={
146                        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1 }}>
147                          <Typography variant="body1" fontWeight={600}>
148                            {t.titel}
149                          </Typography>
150                          <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">
151                            {new Date(t.start).toLocaleTimeString('de-DE', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}
152                            {t.ende && (
153                              <>
154                                {' – '}
155                                {new Date(t.ende).toLocaleTimeString('de-DE', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}
156                              </>
157                            )}
158                          </Typography>
159                          {t.gutachten && (
160                            <Chip
161                              label={t.gutachten.aktenzeichen}
162                              size="small"
163                              variant="outlined"
164                            />
165                          )}
166                        </Box>
167                      }
168                      secondary={
169                        <>
170                          {t.ort && <span>Ort: {t.ort}</span>}
171                          {t.beschreibung && <span> — {t.beschreibung}</span>}
172                        </>
173                      }
174                    />
175                  </ListItem>
176                ))}
177              </List>
178            </Card>
179          </Box>
180        ))
181      )}
182
183      {/* Neuer Termin Dialog */}
184      <Dialog open={dialogOpen} onClose={() => setDialogOpen(false)} maxWidth="sm" fullWidth>
185        <DialogTitle>Neuer Termin</DialogTitle>
186        <DialogContent>
187          <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 2, pt: 1 }}>
188            <TextField
189              label="Titel *"
190              value={newTermin.titel}
191              onChange={(e) => setNewTermin((p) => ({ ...p, titel: e.target.value }))}
192              fullWidth
193              required
194            />
195            <TextField
196              label="Start *"
197              type="datetime-local"
198              value={newTermin.start}
199              onChange={(e) => setNewTermin((p) => ({ ...p, start: e.target.value }))}
200              fullWidth
201              required
202              InputLabelProps={{ shrink: true }}
203            />
204            <TextField
205              label="Ende *"
206              type="datetime-local"
207              value={newTermin.ende}
208              onChange={(e) => setNewTermin((p) => ({ ...p, ende: e.target.value }))}
209              fullWidth
210              required
211              InputLabelProps={{ shrink: true }}
212            />
213            <TextField
214              label="Ort"
215              value={newTermin.ort}
216              onChange={(e) => setNewTermin((p) => ({ ...p, ort: e.target.value }))}
217              fullWidth
218            />
219            <TextField
220              label="Beschreibung"
221              value={newTermin.beschreibung}
222              onChange={(e) => setNewTermin((p) => ({ ...p, beschreibung: e.target.value }))}
223              multiline
224              rows={3}
225              fullWidth
226            />
227          </Box>
228        </DialogContent>
229        <DialogActions>
230          <Button onClick={() => setDialogOpen(false)}>Abbrechen</Button>
231          <Button
232            variant="contained"
233            onClick={handleSave}
234            disabled={saving || !newTermin.titel || !newTermin.start || !newTermin.ende}
235          >
236            Speichern
237          </Button>
238        </DialogActions>
239      </Dialog>
240    </Box>
241  );
242}
243
page.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/kunden/[id]/edit/page.tsx 233 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
  1/**
  2 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/kunden/[id]/edit/page.tsx
  3 * @description Kunden bearbeiten.
  4 */
  5
  6'use client';
  7
  8import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  9
 10import ArrowBackIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ArrowBack';
 11import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
 12import Button from '@mui/material/Button';
 13import Card from '@mui/material/Card';
 14import CardContent from '@mui/material/CardContent';
 15import CardHeader from '@mui/material/CardHeader';
 16import CircularProgress from '@mui/material/CircularProgress';
 17import Grid from '@mui/material/Grid';
 18import TextField from '@mui/material/TextField';
 19import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';
 20import Link from 'next/link';
 21import { useParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
 22
 23import { kundenApi, type CreateKundeInput } from '@/lib/api/kunden.api';
 24
 25export default function KundeEditPage(): React.JSX.Element {
 26  const params = useParams();
 27  const router = useRouter();
 28  const id = params.id as string;
 29
 30  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 31  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
 32  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 33  const [form, setForm] = useState<CreateKundeInput>({
 34    nachname: '',
 35    vorname: '',
 36    firma: '',
 37    email: '',
 38    telefon: '',
 39    mobil: '',
 40    strasse: '',
 41    plz: '',
 42    stadt: '',
 43    land: 'Deutschland',
 44    notizen: '',
 45  });
 46
 47  useEffect(() => {
 48    kundenApi
 49      .findById(id)
 50      .then((k) => {
 51        setForm({
 52          nachname: k.nachname,
 53          vorname: k.vorname ?? '',
 54          firma: k.firma ?? '',
 55          email: k.email ?? '',
 56          telefon: k.telefon ?? '',
 57          mobil: k.mobil ?? '',
 58          strasse: k.strasse ?? '',
 59          plz: k.plz ?? '',
 60          stadt: k.stadt ?? '',
 61          land: k.land ?? 'Deutschland',
 62          notizen: k.notizen ?? '',
 63        });
 64      })
 65      .catch((err: Error) => setError(err.message))
 66      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
 67  }, [id]);
 68
 69  const handleChange = (field: keyof CreateKundeInput) => (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
 70    setForm((prev) => ({ ...prev, [field]: e.target.value || null }));
 71  };
 72
 73  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
 74    e.preventDefault();
 75    if (!form.nachname?.trim()) {
 76      setError('Bitte geben Sie einen Nachnamen ein.');
 77      return;
 78    }
 79    setSaving(true);
 80    setError(null);
 81    try {
 82      await kundenApi.update(id, form);
 83      router.push(`/kunden/${id}`);
 84    } catch (err: unknown) {
 85      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Fehler beim Speichern.');
 86      setSaving(false);
 87    }
 88  };
 89
 90  if (loading) {
 91    return (
 92      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 8 }}>
 93        <CircularProgress />
 94      </Box>
 95    );
 96  }
 97
 98  return (
 99    <Box>
100      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 2, mb: 3 }}>
101        <Button startIcon={<ArrowBackIcon />} component={Link} href={`/kunden/${id}`} color="inherit">
102          Zurück
103        </Button>
104        <Typography variant="h4" fontWeight={700}>
105          Kunde bearbeiten
106        </Typography>
107      </Box>
108
109      <Card sx={{ maxWidth: 900 }}>
110        <CardHeader title="Kundendaten" />
111        <CardContent>
112          <Box component="form" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
113            {error && (
114              <Typography color="error" variant="body2" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
115                {error}
116              </Typography>
117            )}
118
119            <Grid container spacing={2}>
120              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
121                <TextField
122                  label="Vorname"
123                  value={form.vorname ?? ''}
124                  onChange={handleChange('vorname')}
125                  fullWidth
126                />
127              </Grid>
128              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
129                <TextField
130                  label="Nachname *"
131                  value={form.nachname}
132                  onChange={handleChange('nachname')}
133                  required
134                  fullWidth
135                />
136              </Grid>
137              <Grid item xs={12}>
138                <TextField
139                  label="Firma"
140                  value={form.firma ?? ''}
141                  onChange={handleChange('firma')}
142                  fullWidth
143                />
144              </Grid>
145              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
146                <TextField
147                  label="E-Mail"
148                  type="email"
149                  value={form.email ?? ''}
150                  onChange={handleChange('email')}
151                  fullWidth
152                />
153              </Grid>
154              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
155                <TextField
156                  label="Telefon"
157                  value={form.telefon ?? ''}
158                  onChange={handleChange('telefon')}
159                  fullWidth
160                />
161              </Grid>
162              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
163                <TextField
164                  label="Mobil"
165                  value={form.mobil ?? ''}
166                  onChange={handleChange('mobil')}
167                  fullWidth
168                />
169              </Grid>
170              <Grid item xs={12}>
171                <TextField
172                  label="Straße"
173                  value={form.strasse ?? ''}
174                  onChange={handleChange('strasse')}
175                  fullWidth
176                />
177              </Grid>
178              <Grid item xs={4}>
179                <TextField
180                  label="PLZ"
181                  value={form.plz ?? ''}
182                  onChange={handleChange('plz')}
183                  fullWidth
184                />
185              </Grid>
186              <Grid item xs={8}>
187                <TextField
188                  label="Stadt"
189                  value={form.stadt ?? ''}
190                  onChange={handleChange('stadt')}
191                  fullWidth
192                />
193              </Grid>
194              <Grid item xs={12}>
195                <TextField
196                  label="Land"
197                  value={form.land ?? ''}
198                  onChange={handleChange('land')}
199                  fullWidth
200                />
201              </Grid>
202              <Grid item xs={12}>
203                <TextField
204                  label="Notizen"
205                  value={form.notizen ?? ''}
206                  onChange={handleChange('notizen')}
207                  multiline
208                  rows={3}
209                  fullWidth
210                />
211              </Grid>
212            </Grid>
213
214            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: 2, justifyContent: 'flex-end', mt: 3 }}>
215              <Button variant="outlined" component={Link} href={`/kunden/${id}`} disabled={saving}>
216                Abbrechen
217              </Button>
218              <Button
219                type="submit"
220                variant="contained"
221                disabled={saving}
222                startIcon={saving ? <CircularProgress size={16} /> : undefined}
223              >
224                Speichern
225              </Button>
226            </Box>
227          </Box>
228        </CardContent>
229      </Card>
230    </Box>
231  );
232}
233
page.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/kunden/[id]/page.tsx 236 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
  1/**
  2 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/kunden/[id]/page.tsx
  3 * @description Kunden-Detailansicht mit Gutachten und Kontakthistorie.
  4 */
  5
  6'use client';
  7
  8import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  9
 10import ArrowBackIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ArrowBack';
 11import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
 12import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
 13import Button from '@mui/material/Button';
 14import Card from '@mui/material/Card';
 15import CardContent from '@mui/material/CardContent';
 16import CardHeader from '@mui/material/CardHeader';
 17import Chip from '@mui/material/Chip';
 18import CircularProgress from '@mui/material/CircularProgress';
 19import Grid from '@mui/material/Grid';
 20import List from '@mui/material/List';
 21import ListItem from '@mui/material/ListItem';
 22import ListItemText from '@mui/material/ListItemText';
 23import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';
 24import Link from 'next/link';
 25import { useParams } from 'next/navigation';
 26
 27import { kundenApi, type Kunde } from '@/lib/api/kunden.api';
 28
 29interface KundeDetail extends Kunde {
 30  kontakthistorie?: Array<{
 31    id: string;
 32    art: string;
 33    inhalt: string;
 34    bearbeiter: string | null;
 35    kontaktDat: string;
 36  }>;
 37  gutachten?: Array<{
 38    id: string;
 39    aktenzeichen: string;
 40    titel: string;
 41    status: string;
 42    createdAt: string;
 43  }>;
 44}
 45
 46export default function KundeDetailPage(): React.JSX.Element {
 47  const params = useParams();
 48  const id = params.id as string;
 49
 50  const [kunde, setKunde] = useState<KundeDetail | null>(null);
 51  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 52  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 53
 54  useEffect(() => {
 55    kundenApi
 56      .findById(id)
 57      .then((k) => setKunde(k as KundeDetail))
 58      .catch((err: Error) => setError(err.message))
 59      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
 60  }, [id]);
 61
 62  if (loading) {
 63    return (
 64      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 8 }}>
 65        <CircularProgress />
 66      </Box>
 67    );
 68  }
 69
 70  if (error || !kunde) {
 71    return (
 72      <Box sx={{ mt: 4 }}>
 73        <Typography color="error">{error ?? 'Kunde nicht gefunden.'}</Typography>
 74        <Button component={Link} href="/kunden" startIcon={<ArrowBackIcon />} sx={{ mt: 2 }}>
 75          Zurück zur Liste
 76        </Button>
 77      </Box>
 78    );
 79  }
 80
 81  return (
 82    <Box>
 83      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'flex-start', mb: 3 }}>
 84        <Box>
 85          <Button
 86            startIcon={<ArrowBackIcon />}
 87            component={Link}
 88            href="/kunden"
 89            color="inherit"
 90            sx={{ mb: 1 }}
 91          >
 92            Alle Kunden
 93          </Button>
 94          <Typography variant="h4" fontWeight={700}>
 95            {kunde.vorname ? `${kunde.vorname} ${kunde.nachname}` : kunde.nachname}
 96          </Typography>
 97          {kunde.firma && (
 98            <Typography variant="subtitle1" color="text.secondary">
 99              {kunde.firma}
100            </Typography>
101          )}
102        </Box>
103        <Button
104          variant="outlined"
105          startIcon={<EditIcon />}
106          component={Link}
107          href={`/kunden/${id}/edit`}
108        >
109          Bearbeiten
110        </Button>
111      </Box>
112
113      <Grid container spacing={3}>
114        {/* Kontaktdaten */}
115        <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
116          <Card>
117            <CardHeader title="Kontaktdaten" />
118            <CardContent>
119              {kunde.email && (
120                <Box sx={{ mb: 1 }}>
121                  <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">E-Mail</Typography>
122                  <Typography>{kunde.email}</Typography>
123                </Box>
124              )}
125              {kunde.telefon && (
126                <Box sx={{ mb: 1 }}>
127                  <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">Telefon</Typography>
128                  <Typography>{kunde.telefon}</Typography>
129                </Box>
130              )}
131              {kunde.mobil && (
132                <Box sx={{ mb: 1 }}>
133                  <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">Mobil</Typography>
134                  <Typography>{kunde.mobil}</Typography>
135                </Box>
136              )}
137              {(kunde.strasse || kunde.stadt) && (
138                <Box sx={{ mb: 1 }}>
139                  <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">Adresse</Typography>
140                  <Typography>{kunde.strasse}</Typography>
141                  <Typography>{[kunde.plz, kunde.stadt].filter(Boolean).join(' ')}</Typography>
142                </Box>
143              )}
144              {kunde.notizen && (
145                <Box sx={{ mt: 2 }}>
146                  <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">Notizen</Typography>
147                  <Typography variant="body2" sx={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }}>
148                    {kunde.notizen}
149                  </Typography>
150                </Box>
151              )}
152            </CardContent>
153          </Card>
154        </Grid>
155
156        {/* Gutachten */}
157        <Grid item xs={12} md={8}>
158          <Card sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
159            <CardHeader
160              title="Gutachten"
161              subheader={`${kunde.gutachten?.length ?? 0} Gutachten`}
162            />
163            <CardContent sx={{ p: 0 }}>
164              {kunde.gutachten && kunde.gutachten.length > 0 ? (
165                <List dense>
166                  {kunde.gutachten.map((g) => (
167                    <ListItem
168                      key={g.id}
169                      component={Link}
170                      href={`/gutachten/${g.id}`}
171                      sx={{ borderBottom: '1px solid', borderColor: 'divider', '&:hover': { bgcolor: 'action.hover' } }}
172                    >
173                      <ListItemText
174                        primary={
175                          <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1 }}>
176                            <Typography variant="body2" fontWeight={600} color="primary">
177                              {g.aktenzeichen}
178                            </Typography>
179                            <Chip label={g.status} size="small" />
180                          </Box>
181                        }
182                        secondary={g.titel}
183                      />
184                    </ListItem>
185                  ))}
186                </List>
187              ) : (
188                <Box sx={{ p: 2 }}>
189                  <Typography color="text.secondary" variant="body2">
190                    Keine Gutachten vorhanden.
191                  </Typography>
192                </Box>
193              )}
194            </CardContent>
195          </Card>
196
197          {/* Kontakthistorie */}
198          <Card>
199            <CardHeader
200              title="Kontakthistorie"
201              subheader={`${kunde.kontakthistorie?.length ?? 0} Einträge`}
202            />
203            <CardContent sx={{ p: 0 }}>
204              {kunde.kontakthistorie && kunde.kontakthistorie.length > 0 ? (
205                <List dense>
206                  {kunde.kontakthistorie.map((k) => (
207                    <ListItem key={k.id} sx={{ borderBottom: '1px solid', borderColor: 'divider' }}>
208                      <ListItemText
209                        primary={
210                          <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: 1 }}>
211                            <Chip label={k.art} size="small" variant="outlined" />
212                            <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">
213                              {new Date(k.kontaktDat).toLocaleDateString('de-DE')}
214                            </Typography>
215                          </Box>
216                        }
217                        secondary={k.inhalt}
218                      />
219                    </ListItem>
220                  ))}
221                </List>
222              ) : (
223                <Box sx={{ p: 2 }}>
224                  <Typography color="text.secondary" variant="body2">
225                    Keine Kontakteinträge vorhanden.
226                  </Typography>
227                </Box>
228              )}
229            </CardContent>
230          </Card>
231        </Grid>
232      </Grid>
233    </Box>
234  );
235}
236
page.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/kunden/new/page.tsx 191 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
  1/**
  2 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/kunden/new/page.tsx
  3 * @description Neuen Kunden anlegen.
  4 */
  5
  6'use client';
  7
  8import React, { useState } from 'react';
  9
 10import ArrowBackIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ArrowBack';
 11import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
 12import Button from '@mui/material/Button';
 13import Card from '@mui/material/Card';
 14import CardContent from '@mui/material/CardContent';
 15import CardHeader from '@mui/material/CardHeader';
 16import CircularProgress from '@mui/material/CircularProgress';
 17import Grid from '@mui/material/Grid';
 18import TextField from '@mui/material/TextField';
 19import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';
 20import Link from 'next/link';
 21import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
 22
 23import { kundenApi, type CreateKundeInput } from '@/lib/api/kunden.api';
 24
 25export default function NewKundePage(): React.JSX.Element {
 26  const router = useRouter();
 27  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
 28  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 29  const [form, setForm] = useState<CreateKundeInput>({
 30    nachname: '',
 31    vorname: '',
 32    firma: '',
 33    email: '',
 34    telefon: '',
 35    mobil: '',
 36    strasse: '',
 37    plz: '',
 38    stadt: '',
 39    land: 'Deutschland',
 40    notizen: '',
 41  });
 42
 43  const handleChange = (field: keyof CreateKundeInput) => (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
 44    setForm((prev) => ({ ...prev, [field]: e.target.value || null }));
 45  };
 46
 47  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
 48    e.preventDefault();
 49    if (!form.nachname?.trim()) {
 50      setError('Bitte geben Sie einen Nachnamen ein.');
 51      return;
 52    }
 53    setSaving(true);
 54    setError(null);
 55    try {
 56      const kunde = await kundenApi.create(form);
 57      router.push(`/kunden/${kunde.id}`);
 58    } catch (err: unknown) {
 59      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Fehler beim Erstellen des Kunden.');
 60      setSaving(false);
 61    }
 62  };
 63
 64  return (
 65    <Box>
 66      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 2, mb: 3 }}>
 67        <Button startIcon={<ArrowBackIcon />} component={Link} href="/kunden" color="inherit">
 68          Zurück
 69        </Button>
 70        <Typography variant="h4" fontWeight={700}>
 71          Neuer Kunde
 72        </Typography>
 73      </Box>
 74
 75      <Card sx={{ maxWidth: 900 }}>
 76        <CardHeader title="Kundendaten" />
 77        <CardContent>
 78          <Box component="form" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
 79            {error && (
 80              <Typography color="error" variant="body2" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
 81                {error}
 82              </Typography>
 83            )}
 84
 85            <Grid container spacing={2}>
 86              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
 87                <TextField
 88                  label="Vorname"
 89                  value={form.vorname ?? ''}
 90                  onChange={handleChange('vorname')}
 91                  fullWidth
 92                />
 93              </Grid>
 94              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
 95                <TextField
 96                  label="Nachname *"
 97                  value={form.nachname}
 98                  onChange={handleChange('nachname')}
 99                  required
100                  fullWidth
101                />
102              </Grid>
103              <Grid item xs={12}>
104                <TextField
105                  label="Firma"
106                  value={form.firma ?? ''}
107                  onChange={handleChange('firma')}
108                  fullWidth
109                />
110              </Grid>
111              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
112                <TextField
113                  label="E-Mail"
114                  type="email"
115                  value={form.email ?? ''}
116                  onChange={handleChange('email')}
117                  fullWidth
118                />
119              </Grid>
120              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
121                <TextField
122                  label="Telefon"
123                  value={form.telefon ?? ''}
124                  onChange={handleChange('telefon')}
125                  fullWidth
126                />
127              </Grid>
128              <Grid item xs={12} sm={6}>
129                <TextField
130                  label="Mobil"
131                  value={form.mobil ?? ''}
132                  onChange={handleChange('mobil')}
133                  fullWidth
134                />
135              </Grid>
136              <Grid item xs={12}>
137                <TextField
138                  label="Straße"
139                  value={form.strasse ?? ''}
140                  onChange={handleChange('strasse')}
141                  fullWidth
142                />
143              </Grid>
144              <Grid item xs={4}>
145                <TextField
146                  label="PLZ"
147                  value={form.plz ?? ''}
148                  onChange={handleChange('plz')}
149                  fullWidth
150                />
151              </Grid>
152              <Grid item xs={8}>
153                <TextField
154                  label="Stadt"
155                  value={form.stadt ?? ''}
156                  onChange={handleChange('stadt')}
157                  fullWidth
158                />
159              </Grid>
160              <Grid item xs={12}>
161                <TextField
162                  label="Notizen"
163                  value={form.notizen ?? ''}
164                  onChange={handleChange('notizen')}
165                  multiline
166                  rows={3}
167                  fullWidth
168                />
169              </Grid>
170            </Grid>
171
172            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: 2, justifyContent: 'flex-end', mt: 3 }}>
173              <Button variant="outlined" component={Link} href="/kunden" disabled={saving}>
174                Abbrechen
175              </Button>
176              <Button
177                type="submit"
178                variant="contained"
179                disabled={saving}
180                startIcon={saving ? <CircularProgress size={16} /> : undefined}
181              >
182                Kunden erstellen
183              </Button>
184            </Box>
185          </Box>
186        </CardContent>
187      </Card>
188    </Box>
189  );
190}
191
page.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/kunden/page.tsx 148 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
  1/**
  2 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/kunden/page.tsx
  3 * @description Kunden-Listenansicht.
  4 */
  5
  6'use client';
  7
  8import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  9
 10import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
 11import SearchIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Search';
 12import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
 13import Button from '@mui/material/Button';
 14import CircularProgress from '@mui/material/CircularProgress';
 15import InputAdornment from '@mui/material/InputAdornment';
 16import Paper from '@mui/material/Paper';
 17import Table from '@mui/material/Table';
 18import TableBody from '@mui/material/TableBody';
 19import TableCell from '@mui/material/TableCell';
 20import TableContainer from '@mui/material/TableContainer';
 21import TableHead from '@mui/material/TableHead';
 22import TablePagination from '@mui/material/TablePagination';
 23import TableRow from '@mui/material/TableRow';
 24import TextField from '@mui/material/TextField';
 25import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';
 26import Link from 'next/link';
 27import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
 28
 29import { kundenApi, type KundenListResponse } from '@/lib/api/kunden.api';
 30
 31export default function KundenListePage(): React.JSX.Element {
 32  const router = useRouter();
 33  const [page, setPage] = useState(0);
 34  const [rowsPerPage, setRowsPerPage] = useState(20);
 35  const [suche, setSuche] = useState('');
 36  const [data, setData] = useState<KundenListResponse | null>(null);
 37  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 38  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 39
 40  useEffect(() => {
 41    setLoading(true);
 42    kundenApi
 43      .list({ page: page + 1, pageSize: rowsPerPage, suche: suche || undefined })
 44      .then(setData)
 45      .catch((err: Error) => setError(err.message))
 46      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
 47  }, [page, rowsPerPage, suche]);
 48
 49  return (
 50    <Box>
 51      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', mb: 3 }}>
 52        <Typography variant="h4" fontWeight={700}>
 53          Kunden
 54        </Typography>
 55        <Button
 56          variant="contained"
 57          startIcon={<AddIcon />}
 58          component={Link}
 59          href="/kunden/new"
 60        >
 61          Neuer Kunde
 62        </Button>
 63      </Box>
 64
 65      <Paper sx={{ mb: 2, p: 2 }}>
 66        <TextField
 67          fullWidth
 68          size="small"
 69          placeholder="Suchen nach Name, Firma, E-Mail..."
 70          value={suche}
 71          onChange={(e) => { setSuche(e.target.value); setPage(0); }}
 72          InputProps={{
 73            startAdornment: (
 74              <InputAdornment position="start">
 75                <SearchIcon />
 76              </InputAdornment>
 77            ),
 78          }}
 79        />
 80      </Paper>
 81
 82      <TableContainer component={Paper}>
 83        {loading ? (
 84          <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', p: 4 }}>
 85            <CircularProgress />
 86          </Box>
 87        ) : error ? (
 88          <Box sx={{ p: 4 }}>
 89            <Typography color="error">{error}</Typography>
 90          </Box>
 91        ) : (
 92          <>
 93            <Table>
 94              <TableHead>
 95                <TableRow>
 96                  <TableCell>Name</TableCell>
 97                  <TableCell>Firma</TableCell>
 98                  <TableCell>E-Mail</TableCell>
 99                  <TableCell>Telefon</TableCell>
100                  <TableCell>Gutachten</TableCell>
101                </TableRow>
102              </TableHead>
103              <TableBody>
104                {data?.kunden.map((k) => (
105                  <TableRow
106                    key={k.id}
107                    hover
108                    sx={{ cursor: 'pointer' }}
109                    onClick={() => router.push(`/kunden/${k.id}`)}
110                  >
111                    <TableCell>
112                      <Typography variant="body2" fontWeight={600}>
113                        {k.vorname ? `${k.vorname} ${k.nachname}` : k.nachname}
114                      </Typography>
115                    </TableCell>
116                    <TableCell>{k.firma ?? '—'}</TableCell>
117                    <TableCell>{k.email ?? '—'}</TableCell>
118                    <TableCell>{k.telefon ?? k.mobil ?? '—'}</TableCell>
119                    <TableCell>{k._count?.gutachten ?? 0}</TableCell>
120                  </TableRow>
121                ))}
122                {(!data?.kunden.length) && (
123                  <TableRow>
124                    <TableCell colSpan={5} align="center" sx={{ py: 4 }}>
125                      <Typography color="text.secondary">Keine Kunden gefunden.</Typography>
126                    </TableCell>
127                  </TableRow>
128                )}
129              </TableBody>
130            </Table>
131            <TablePagination
132              component="div"
133              count={data?.meta.total ?? 0}
134              page={page}
135              onPageChange={(_, newPage) => setPage(newPage)}
136              rowsPerPage={rowsPerPage}
137              onRowsPerPageChange={(e) => { setRowsPerPage(parseInt(e.target.value, 10)); setPage(0); }}
138              rowsPerPageOptions={[10, 20, 50]}
139              labelRowsPerPage="Zeilen pro Seite:"
140              labelDisplayedRows={({ from, to, count }) => `${from}–${to} von ${count}`}
141            />
142          </>
143        )}
144      </TableContainer>
145    </Box>
146  );
147}
148
layout.tsx apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx 63 Zeilen · Web — Pages 
 1'use client';
 2
 3// Alle Dashboard-Seiten dynamisch rendern (keine statische Generierung)
 4// noetig weil Seiten API-Calls und useSearchParams verwenden
 5export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
 6
 7/**
 8 * @file apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx
 9 * @description Layout für alle Dashboard-Seiten.
10 *
11 * Enthält: TopBar (oben) + Sidebar (links) + Hauptinhalt (rechts)
12 * Dieses Layout gilt für alle Seiten unter (dashboard)/.
13 */
14
15import React, { useState } from 'react';
16
17import Box from '@mui/material/Box';
18import Toolbar from '@mui/material/Toolbar';
19
